afbtit2.name: African Blue Tit
afbtit2.id: Small tit with bright cobalt-blue crown, wings and tail, white face bordered by dark blue eye-stripe and collar. Yellow underparts, greenish-blue back. Short black bill, bluish-grey legs; rounded compact body.

barpet.name: Band-rumped Storm-Petrel
barpet.id: Small dark storm-petrel, sooty blackish-brown overall with a broad clean white rump band wrapping onto the flanks. Pale wing-covert bar, slightly forked tail; short black bill, black legs.

afrcha1.name: African Chaffinch
afrcha1.id: Robust finch; male has slate-grey head and nape, warm pinkish-brown breast and back, white wing bars and white shoulder patch, greenish rump. Whitish belly, conical greyish bill, brownish legs.

alepar2.name: Alexandrine Parakeet
alepar2.id: Large long-tailed green parakeet with massive red bill, deep red shoulder patch on wing coverts. Male shows narrow black chin stripe and pink-and-black neck collar. Very long graduated blue-green tail; grey legs.

alpacc1.name: Alpine Accentor
alpacc1.id: Plump streaky sparrow-like bird; grey-brown head and breast, chestnut-streaked flanks, dark-and-white spotted throat. Brown streaked back, dark wings with white-tipped covert spots forming a wing-bar row. Yellow-based dark bill, reddish legs.

alpswi1.name: Alpine Swift
alpswi1.id: Large powerful swift with scythe-shaped wings; brown upperparts and brown breast-band separating a white throat from a white belly. Short forked tail, dark eye, tiny black bill, dark legs.

arcloo.name: Arctic Loon
arcloo.id: Large slender diver; smooth pale grey crown and hindneck, black throat patch, bold black-and-white striped neck sides, white-spotted black back. White underparts, dagger-like grey bill held level, dark legs.

arcter.name: Arctic Tern
arcter.id: Slender pale grey tern with full black cap, short red bill (no black tip), very short red legs. Long translucent white wings with narrow dark trailing-edge tip; deeply forked long white tail streamers, grey underparts.

arcwar1.name: Arctic Warbler
arcwar1.id: Small olive-green warbler with long pale yellowish supercilium reaching almost to nape, dark eyestripe. Whitish underparts faintly washed yellow, one faint pale wing bar. Spike-like bill with pale orange lower mandible, pinkish-orange legs.

atlpuf.name: Atlantic Puffin
atlpuf.id: Stocky black-and-white auk with large triangular bill, ridged red-orange with bluish-grey base. Black crown and collar, broad white-grey face, white underparts. Orange legs and feet; upright dumpy posture.

audgul1.name: Audouin's Gull
audgul1.id: Elegant pale gull with white head and body, pale grey back, black wingtips. Distinctive dark coral-red bill with black band and yellow tip; dark eye with red orbital ring, dark grey-green legs. Long-winged slim build.

azwmag3.name: Iberian Magpie
azwmag3.id: Slim long-tailed magpie with glossy black cap, pale grey-buff body, and pale grey throat. Bright azure-blue wings and very long blue tail. Black bill and legs; graceful elongated proportions.

bahgoo.name: Bar-headed Goose
bahgoo.id: Pale grey goose with white head crossed by two bold black bars on the nape, white face stripe down the neck sides. Pale grey body, orange-yellow bill, orange legs.

baicra1.name: Baillon's Crake
baicra1.id: Tiny crake with olive-brown black-streaked and white-flecked upperparts, slate-blue-grey face and breast, black-and-white barred flanks and undertail. Short greenish bill (no red), dull green legs; very small dumpy body.

banswa.name: Bank Swallow
banswa.id: Small brown swallow-martin; plain grey-brown upperparts, white underparts crossed by a distinct brown breast-band. White throat, short notched tail, tiny black bill, dark legs. Smallest, plainest hirundine.

barpar2.name: Barbary Partridge
barpar2.id: Plump partridge with grey-brown back and breast; greyish face bordered by a broad chestnut collar speckled with white spots. Greyish crown, barred chestnut-and-grey flanks. Red bill, red legs.

barswa.name: Barn Swallow
barswa.id: Glossy steel-blue above with dark chestnut-red forehead and throat, a blue-black breast-band, and creamy-white underparts. Very long deeply forked tail with thin streamers showing white spots. Black bill, dark legs.

barwar1.name: Barred Warbler
barwar1.id: Large bulky grey warbler; grey-brown upperparts, pale underparts finely barred with dark crescents (scaly look). Pale yellow eye, two thin pale wing bars, white-cornered tail. Stout grey bill, greyish legs.

batgod.name: Bar-tailed Godwit
batgod.id: Large long-legged wader; breeding male with brick-red head, neck and underparts, mottled grey-brown back. Long slightly upturned bill pink at base, black tip. Tail finely barred, dark legs.

bbspet1.name: Black-bellied Storm-Petrel
bbspet1.id: Blackish storm-petrel with white rump and white belly patch divided by a dark central line down the underbody. Long legs, dark webbed feet projecting past short forked tail; black bill.

bcbeat1.name: Blue-cheeked Bee-eater
bcbeat1.id: Slender green bee-eater; overall grass-green with rufous-buff throat, blue cheek stripe and forehead bordering black eye-mask. Coppery underwing, long central tail streamers. Long down-curved black bill, dark legs.

bcnher.name: Black-crowned Night Heron
bcnher.id: Stocky short-necked heron with black crown and back, pale grey wings, white face and underparts. Two long white nape plumes; large red eye, stout dark bill, yellowish legs.

bearee1.name: Bearded Reedling
bearee1.id: Long-tailed tawny-cinnamon bird; male has blue-grey head with bold black moustache drooping from eye, black-and-white undertail. Warm rufous-buff body, very long graduated tail. Yellow-orange bill, dark legs.

bkbplo.name: Black-bellied Plover
bkbplo.id: Plump large plover; breeding adult silvery spangled grey-and-black above, black face, throat and belly bordered by white, white undertail. Black armpits, stout black bill, grey-black legs.

bkewhe1.name: Western Black-eared Wheatear
bkewhe1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
bkewhe1.id: Slim wheatear; sandy-buff crown and back, pale orange-buff breast, white belly. Black throat (or black mask) and black wings; white rump and tail with black inverted-T pattern. Black bill, black legs.

bkewhe2.name: Eastern Black-eared Wheatear
bkewhe2.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
bkewhe2.id: Slim wheatear with creamy-white crown and back, black face-mask through eye and black wings. Pale buff breast fading to white belly; white rump and tail with black inverted-T. Black bill, black legs. Emphasise: the eye sits slightly further back on the face.

bkhgul.name: Black-headed Gull
bkhgul.id: Small gull; breeding adult with chocolate-brown hood, white neck and underparts, pale grey back. White leading wing-edge, black wingtips. Dark red bill and dark red legs, narrow white eye-crescents.

bklkit.name: Black-legged Kittiwake
bklkit.id: Medium gull with white head and body, pale grey back, and clean black wingtips with no white spots (dipped-in-ink look). Slender yellow bill, dark eye, short black legs. Emphasise: a gentle, mild facial expression, not fierce or angry.

bkskit1.name: Black-winged Kite
bkskit1.id: Small pale falcon-like raptor; pearly grey above, white head and underparts, with bold black shoulder patches on the upperwing. Large forward-set red eyes, short black-tipped bill, yellow legs; long pointed wings.

bkwsti.name: Black-winged Stilt
bkwsti.id: Very long-legged slim wader; pure white body and head, glossy black back and wings. Extremely long bright pink-red legs, fine straight black needle bill, red eye.

blackc1.name: Eurasian Blackcap
blackc1.id: Plain grey warbler; male grey-brown above, paler grey below, with a neat glossy black cap to eye level. Greyer face and nape, no wing bars. Fine dark bill, grey legs.

blagro1.name: Black Grouse
blagro1.id: Large grouse; male glossy blue-black with a lyre-shaped curved tail, white undertail coverts forming a puffy white patch, white wing-bar. Bright red wattle over eye, dark bill, feathered dark legs.

blakit1.name: Black Kite
blakit1.id: Medium brown raptor; dark rufous-brown overall with paler greyish head and faint pale wing patches. Long wings, distinctly shallow-forked tail. Yellow legs, dark-tipped yellow bill.

blared1.name: Black Redstart
blared1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
blared1.id: Small chat; male sooty-black face, throat and breast, dark slate-grey crown and back, blackish belly with whitish wing panel. Rusty-orange rump and tail sides. Fine black bill, black legs.

blasto1.name: Black Stork
blasto1.id: Tall stork; glossy black head, neck, back and wings with green-purple iridescence, sharply contrasting white belly and undertail. Long straight bright red bill, long red legs, red eye-ring.

blawhe1.name: Black Wheatear
blawhe1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
blawhe1.id: All-black wheatear; sooty black plumage overall with contrasting white rump, white undertail coverts, and white tail-base showing a black terminal band. Black bill, black legs.

blawoo1.name: Black Woodpecker
blawoo1.id: Large crow-sized woodpecker; entirely black with a glaring pale yellow eye and a bright red crown (full red crown on male). Long neck, chisel pale ivory bill, grey legs.

blbsan1.name: Black-bellied Sandgrouse
blbsan1.id: Bulky sandgrouse; male sandy-buff above with fine dark spotting, grey head and throat with chestnut throat patch, narrow black breast-band above a black belly. Short greyish bill, feathered legs.

blhbun1.name: Black-headed Bunting
blhbun1.id: Bright bunting; male has glossy black head, lemon-yellow throat and underparts, and a rich rufous-chestnut back and rump. Plain unstreaked yellow belly, stout pale grey conical bill, pinkish legs.

blkfra.name: Black Francolin
blkfra.id: Striking gamebird; male glossy black with bold white cheek patches, a broad chestnut neck-collar, and white-spotted black flanks. Brown-barred wings and back, reddish bill, orange-red legs.

blkgui.name: Black Guillemot
blkgui.id: Small black auk; sooty black overall with a large bold white oval wing patch. Bright scarlet-red mouth lining and legs; slender pointed black bill, dark eye.

blksco1.name: Common Scoter
blksco1.id: Bulky all-black sea duck; male entirely glossy black with a knob at the bill base; bill black with a yellow-orange patch on the upper ridge. Dark legs, pointed tail.

blkswa.name: Black Swan
blkswa.id: Large all-black swan; sooty-black plumage with white flight feathers visible in the wing. Long curved neck, bright red bill with a white band near the tip, dark legs.

blkter.name: Black Tern
blkter.id: Small marsh tern; breeding adult slate-grey body with a black head and breast, dark grey wings, and white undertail coverts. Slightly forked grey tail, slender black bill, dark reddish legs.

blrwar1.name: Blyth's Reed Warbler
blrwar1.id: Small plain warbler, uniform warm olive-brown above and pale buff-cream below, with a short faint pale supercilium and pale eye-ring giving a gentle expression. Long fine dark bill, dark legs, and a rounded tail; no wing bars or streaking.

blueth.name: Bluethroat
blueth.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
blueth.id: Robin-shaped chat, warm brown above with a bold white supercilium; throat brilliant blue bordered below by black, then a rufous band, with a central red or white spot. Belly whitish; rusty-orange tail base flashes in flight, thin dark bill, slim dark legs.

blutit.name: Eurasian Blue Tit
blutit.id: Small compact tit with sky-blue crown, wings and tail, a white face crossed by a black eye-stripe and blue-black nape collar, and bright yellow underparts. Greenish back, short stubby black bill, bluish-grey legs.

bohwax.name: Bohemian Waxwing
bohwax.id: Plump pinkish-grey bird with a prominent backswept crest, black mask and bib, and a chestnut undertail. Wings show white and yellow markings with waxy red tips; tail tipped bright yellow, short dark bill, dark legs.

boneag2.name: Bonelli's Eagle
boneag2.id: Large eagle, dark brown above with a pale whitish breast and belly finely streaked dark, and a whitish nape patch. In flight long broad wings and a long grey barred tail with a broad dark terminal band; yellow legs and cere, dark hooked bill.

booeag1.name: Booted Eagle
booeag1.id: Small compact eagle (pale morph) with creamy-white underparts and underwing-coverts contrasting dark flight feathers, brown upperparts with a pale wing panel. Square-tipped tail, small head, feathered legs yellow-toed, dark hooked bill.

borowl.name: Boreal Owl
borowl.id: Small owl with a large square greyish-white facial disc bordered black, raised white-spotted eyebrows giving a surprised look, and yellow eyes. Chocolate-brown upperparts heavily spotted white, white underparts streaked brown; pale bill, feathered feet. Emphasise: a calm, neutral to gentle facial expression, not angry.

brant.name: Brant
brant.id: Small dark goose with black head, neck and breast, a small white neck collar patch, dark brownish-grey back, and pale flanks. White undertail and stern conspicuous, short black bill and black legs.

brbsan.name: Broad-billed Sandpiper
brbsan.id: Tiny short-legged sandpiper, dark brown above with whitish mantle stripes forming a split supercilium and pale-edged feathers, streaked breast, white belly. Long slightly downcurved black bill kinked at tip, short dark legs.

brnowl.name: American Barn Owl
brnowl.id: Pale heart-shaped white facial disc with dark eyes, golden-buff and grey upperparts finely speckled, and pure white underparts. Long white-feathered legs, dark-tipped pale bill, rounded wings; ghostly overall appearance.

brnrav1.name: Brown-necked Raven
brnrav1.id: Large all-dark corvid, glossy black with a bronzy-brown wash on the neck and nape visible in good light. Long heavy black bill, slim long-winged silhouette, wedge-shaped tail, black legs.

budger.name: Budgerigar
budger.id: Small slender parakeet, bright green below with a yellow face and head finely barred black on the nape and back, plus dark throat spots and a blue cheek patch. Long tapering blue-green tail, small grey-blue cere bill, greyish legs.

bulpet.name: Bulwer's Petrel
bulpet.id: Slim sooty-brown petrel, uniformly dark with a paler diagonal bar across the upperwing-coverts. Long pointed wings, a long pointed wedge-shaped tail held closed, short hooked black tubenose bill.

burthr.name: Blue Rock-Thrush
burthr.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
burthr.id: Slim thrush-sized chat, uniformly deep slate-blue overall with fine pale spangling, slightly darker wings and tail. Long thin blackish bill, dark legs; rounded head and upright posture.

cacgoo1.name: Cackling Goose
cacgoo1.id: Small compact goose with black head and neck, a white chin-strap cheek patch, brown back and pale breast. Short stubby black bill and rounded head distinguish it; white rump band, dark tail, black legs.

callar1.name: Calandra Lark
callar1.id: Large bulky lark, streaky sandy-brown above and whitish below with a bold black patch on each side of the neck. Heavy pale conical bill, broad wings showing a white trailing edge in flight, pale legs, short white-cornered tail.

cangoo.name: Canada Goose
cangoo.id: Large goose with a long black neck and head bearing a broad white chin-strap cheek patch, brown back, and pale tan breast. White undertail and U-shaped rump band, black bill and black legs.

casgul2.name: Caspian Gull
casgul2.id: Large pale grey-backed gull with white head and underparts, long slender pale-yellow bill, and a small dark eye giving a gentle look. Long legs pale pink to yellowish, black wingtips with white spots, sloping forehead and long neck.

caster1.name: Caspian Tern
caster1.id: Very large tern with a massive blood-red dagger bill, black cap, pale grey back and wings, and white underparts. Dusky underside to the primaries, slightly forked tail, short black legs.

categr1.name: Western Cattle-Egret
categr1.id: Small stocky white egret with a short thick yellow-orange bill, hunched neck, and buff-orange plumes on crown, breast and back when breeding. Yellowish to dusky legs, rounded head; otherwise pure white.

cetwar1.name: Cetti's Warbler
cetwar1.id: Small rich rufous-brown warbler, warm chestnut-brown above and greyish-white below with greyer face and a short whitish supercilium. Broad rounded cocked tail, short rounded wings, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.

chifla1.name: Chilean Flamingo
chifla1.id: Tall pinkish flamingo, pale rose-white body with brighter pink wing-coverts, and grey legs with contrasting bright red knees and feet. Strongly downbent bill pale with a black tip, long sinuous neck.

chiwig1.name: Chiloe Wigeon
chiwig1.id: Striking duck with a glossy green-black head, white forecrown and cheeks, rich chestnut flanks, and a black-and-white scaled back. White wing patch, dark vermiculated breast, short blue-grey bill, grey legs.

cinvul1.name: Cinereous Vulture
cinvul1.id: Huge dark vulture, uniformly blackish-brown with a bare bluish-grey head ruffed with dark down and a pale horn-coloured bill base. In flight enormous broad rectangular wings and short wedge tail, pale feet.

citfin1.name: Citril Finch
citfin1.id: Small finch, bright yellow-green below and on the face with a soft grey nape and neck-sides, and an olive-green streaked back. Two pale wing bars, unstreaked yellowish underparts, short stubby grey bill, dark legs.

citwag.name: Citrine Wagtail
citwag.id: Slender wagtail with a bright lemon-yellow head and underparts, a black hindneck band, and a blue-grey back. Two bold white wing bars on dark wings, long black tail with white outer feathers, thin black bill, dark legs.

coatit2.name: Coal Tit
coatit2.id: Small tit with a glossy black cap and bib, white cheeks, and a diagnostic white nape patch. Olive-grey back, buff-grey underparts, two thin white wing bars, fine dark bill, bluish-grey legs. Emphasise: a prominent white nape patch and white cheeks; small-bird proportions with a relatively large head.

cockat.name: Cockatiel
cockat.id: Slim grey parrot with a tall pointed crest, white wing patches, and a long tapering grey tail. Face yellow with a round orange cheek patch; small grey hooked bill, grey legs.

combul2.name: Common Bulbul
combul2.id: Plain brownish bulbul, dusky grey-brown overall with a darker brown head, slightly paler throat, and whitish lower belly with yellow undertail-coverts. Slim slightly downcurved black bill, dark legs, longish tail.

combuz1.name: Common Buzzard
combuz1.id: Medium raptor, variable brown above and below with a pale band across the lower breast and barred underparts. In flight broad rounded wings with dark wrist patches and dark trailing edge, barred tail, yellow cere and legs, hooked bill.

comcan.name: Island Canary
comcan.id: Small finch, soft greenish-yellow overall, streaked grey-green on the back, with a yellower face and breast and whitish belly. Two faint wing bars, short conical pinkish bill, pale legs.

comcha.name: Common Chaffinch
comcha.id: Finch with a blue-grey crown and nape, pinkish-brown face and breast, and a greenish rump. Bold double white wing bars and white shoulder patch on dark wings, white outer tail feathers, conical grey bill, pinkish legs. Emphasise: feet and claws naturally placed gripping the perch.

comcra.name: Common Crane
comcra.id: Tall elegant grey crane with a black face and foreneck, a white stripe down the side of the neck, and a small red crown patch. Drooping bushy black-and-grey tail plumes, long dark legs, straight greyish bill.

comhom1.name: Western House-Martin
comhom1.id: Small martin, glossy blue-black above with a conspicuous square white rump, and pure white underparts. Short forked tail, broad-based pointed wings, tiny black bill, and white-feathered legs and feet.

comkin1.name: Common Kingfisher
comkin1.id: Small dumpy kingfisher with brilliant electric-blue upperparts and a turquoise back stripe, orange underparts, and orange ear patch behind a white throat. Long straight dagger bill, short red legs, large head, stubby tail.

comloo.name: Common Loon
comloo.id: Large diver, blackish-green head and neck with a white necklace of vertical stripes, a checkerboard black-and-white back, and white underparts. Heavy straight dagger-shaped black bill, red eye, low in water.

commyn.name: Common Myna
commyn.id: Stocky brown bird with glossy black head and throat, bare yellow skin patch behind the eye, yellow bill and legs, white wing patches and white tail tip conspicuous in flight, and a dark vinous-brown body.

comnig1.name: Common Nightingale
comnig1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
comnig1.id: Plain warm rufous-brown bird with a brighter chestnut-red rounded tail, paler buff-grey underparts, faintly large dark eye, fine pale eye-ring, slim dark bill and pinkish legs; robin-like but larger and longer-tailed.

compea.name: Indian Peafowl
compea.id: Large iridescent blue-necked peacock with a fan-shaped crest of wire-tufts, glossy green-and-bronze train studded with blue-green eyespots, scaly bronze-green wing feathers, white face patches and grey legs.

compoc.name: Common Pochard
compoc.id: Medium diving duck with rich chestnut-red head, black breast and rear, pale grey vermiculated body, a black bill crossed by a pale blue-grey band, and a red eye; sloping forehead profile.

comrav.name: Common Raven
comrav.id: Very large all-glossy-black corvid with purple-blue sheen, a massive heavy black bill, shaggy throat hackles, long wedge-shaped tail and broad fingered wings; stout black legs.

comros.name: Common Rosefinch
comros.id: Plump finch with rosy-red head, breast and rump in the male, brown wings and back, whitish belly, plain face with a large dark eye, two faint wing-bars and a stubby pale conical bill.

comshe.name: Common Shelduck
comshe.id: Large goose-like duck, mostly white with a dark glossy-green head, a broad chestnut breast-band, black scapular and belly stripes, a bright red bill with a knob, and pink legs.

comter.name: Common Tern
comter.id: Slender pale-grey tern with a black cap, pale grey underparts, an orange-red bill tipped black, short red legs, long pointed wings and deeply forked white tail with long streamers.

comwax.name: Common Waxbill
comwax.id: Tiny greyish-brown waxbill finely barred all over, with a bright red bill and a broad red mask through the eye, a reddish belly patch, and a long dark tail; small and slim.

corbun1.name: Corn Bunting
corbun1.id: Large plump dull bunting, streaky grey-brown above and on buff underparts, with dense dark streaking on the breast forming a central spot, a plain face, a pale stout conical bill and pinkish legs.

corcra.name: Corn Crake
corcra.id: Buff-brown rail with grey face and breast, bold chestnut barring on the flanks, blackish streaking on the back, a short stout pale bill, pinkish legs, and bright rufous wing patches in flight.

corfin1.name: Corsican Finch
corfin1.id: Small finch with a yellow-green face and breast, grey-brown nape and crown, streaked greenish-brown back, yellowish wing-bars and yellow wing-flash, and a pale conical bill; brighter and greyer-capped than a Citril Finch. Emphasise: no white stripe or wing-bar across the wing.

corplo.name: Common Ringed Plover
corplo.id: Small plump plover, sandy-brown above and white below, with a complete black breast-band, black mask and forehead, a white forehead and collar, an orange bill with black tip and orange-yellow legs.

corshe1.name: Cory's Shearwater
corshe1.id: Large grey-brown shearwater with a pale-scaled grey-brown head and back blending into white underparts, a thick pale yellow bill with a dark tip, dark underwing margins and long broad-winged silhouette.

cowpig1.name: Common Wood-Pigeon
cowpig1.id: Large grey pigeon with a pinkish breast, a bold white patch on each side of the neck, a broad white wing-bar across the grey wing, an iridescent green-purple neck sheen, and a yellow-tipped pinkish bill.

crelar1.name: Crested Lark
crelar1.id: Sandy buff-brown lark, streaked above and on the breast, with a long spiky upstanding crest, a longish slightly down-curved pale bill, pale buff underwing in flight, and a short tail with buff outer feathers.

cretit2.name: Crested Tit
cretit2.id: Small grey-brown tit with a tall pointed black-and-white speckled crest, whitish face outlined by black, a black bib and a curved black collar-mark, pale buff underparts and a short dark bill.

crwfin2.name: Crimson-winged Finch
crwfin2.id: Stocky pale sandy-brown finch with a grey head, pinkish-red wash on the face and wings, bold crimson-pink wing patches and tail edges, and a pale yellowish conical bill.

cypwhe1.name: Cyprus Wheatear
cypwhe1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
cypwhe1.id: Small wheatear with black face, throat and wings contrasting with a white crown, nape and underparts, a black inverted-T tail pattern on white, and black legs; crisp black-and-white pied appearance.

dalpel1.name: Dalmatian Pelican
dalpel1.id: Huge silvery-grey-white pelican with curly nape feathers, an orange-red gular pouch in breeding, a pale yellowish-grey bill, greyish legs, and pale grey feet; bulky with a massive bill.

darwar1.name: Dartford Warbler
darwar1.id: Small dark long-tailed warbler, slate-grey above, with a dark wine-red breast and throat speckled white, a red eye and red eye-ring, a cocked dark white-tipped tail, and a thin dark bill.

desfin2.name: Desert Finch
desfin2.id: Pale sandy-grey finch with a black-and-white wing pattern showing pink at the base of the flight feathers, a black bill, a black mask around the eye and a black chin, and a buff-grey body.

desspa1.name: Dead Sea Sparrow
desspa1.id: Small sparrow with a grey head, a chestnut crown-side band and broad white supercilium, a black bib, yellow spots at the throat sides, chestnut back streaked black, and whitish underparts.

deswhe1.name: Desert Wheatear
deswhe1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
deswhe1.id: Pale sandy-buff wheatear with a black face and throat that join black wings, sandy crown and back, pale buff underparts, and an all-black tail (no white inverted-T) above a small white rump.

diadov1.name: Diamond Dove
diadov1.id: Tiny pale blue-grey dove, brownish on the back and wings spangled with small white spots, a grey head and breast, a deep red eye-ring, a dark slender bill and a long tail; very small and delicate.

dunnoc1.name: Dunnock
dunnoc1.id: Small streaky brown bird with a blue-grey head and breast, brown black-streaked back, brownish flanks streaked dark, a thin pointed dark bill and pinkish-brown legs; sparrow-sized but slim-billed.

duplar1.name: Dupont's Lark
duplar1.id: Slim long-bodied lark, sandy grey-brown streaked above and on the breast, with a pale supercilium and eye-ring, a long thin slightly down-curved bill, a peaked crown and pale buff legs.

eaowar1.name: Eastern Olivaceous Warbler
eaowar1.id: Small plain pale warbler, greyish-brown above and whitish below, with a faint pale supercilium, a longish dagger-like bill with an orange base, a pale eye-ring and pale legs; featureless and slim.

eargre.name: Eared Grebe
eargre.id: Small grebe with a black head and neck, a fan of golden-yellow ear plumes spreading behind a red eye, a peaked crown, dark back, chestnut flanks and a thin slightly upturned dark bill.

easwar1.name: Eastern Subalpine Warbler
easwar1.id: Small Sylvia warbler with a blue-grey head and back, a brick-orange throat and breast, a white moustachial stripe separating throat from face, white belly, a red eye-ring and white outer tail.

eaywag1.name: Western Yellow Wagtail
eaywag1.id: Slim long-tailed wagtail with a yellow throat and underparts, an olive-green back, a blue-grey head with a white supercilium, blackish wings with pale-edged coverts, and dark legs.

egygoo.name: Egyptian Goose
egygoo.id: Large pale buff-brown goose-like duck with a dark chocolate patch around each eye and on the breast, a chestnut-brown back, pink bill and legs, and bold white wing patches with green visible in flight.

egyvul1.name: Egyptian Vulture
egyvul1.id: Smallish vulture, mostly creamy-white with black flight feathers, a bare yellow-orange face, a shaggy white ruff and spiky nape, a thin yellow hooked bill and a wedge-shaped white tail.

elefal1.name: Eleonora's Falcon
elefal1.id: Slim long-winged falcon with long tail; dark slate-grey above, rusty-buff underparts with dark streaking, dark moustachial stripe on pale throat. Yellow cere and feet, dark wingtips; dark-morph birds are uniformly sooty.

ettwoo1.name: Eurasian Three-toed Woodpecker
ettwoo1.id: Small black-and-white woodpecker with barred black-and-white flanks, white-streaked black back, and no red; male shows a yellow crown patch. Black face with white stripes, dark bill, grey legs.

eubeat1.name: European Bee-eater
eubeat1.id: Slender, vividly coloured bird with chestnut crown and back, golden-yellow shoulders, turquoise-blue underparts, yellow throat bordered by black gorget, black eyestripe, long decurved black bill and projecting central tail spike.

eucdov.name: Eurasian Collared-Dove
eucdov.id: Pale sandy grey-buff dove with a thin black half-collar edged white on the hindneck, paler head, blackish primaries, broad white-tipped tail underside, dark bill and deep-pink legs.

eueowl1.name: Eurasian Eagle-Owl
eueowl1.id: Massive owl with mottled tawny-brown plumage streaked black, prominent ear tufts, large orange eyes, pale facial disc, finely barred underparts, powerful feathered legs and dark hooked bill.

eugori2.name: Eurasian Golden Oriole
eugori2.id: Brilliant golden-yellow bird with black wings and black tail with yellow corners, black lores, pinkish-red bill. Females and immatures are yellowish-green above with streaked pale underparts.

eugplo.name: European Golden-Plover
eugplo.id: Plump plover spangled gold and black above; breeding adult shows black face, throat and belly bordered by a broad white S-shaped band up the neck. Short black bill, grey legs, white underwing.

eugwoo2.name: Eurasian Green Woodpecker
eugwoo2.id: Large green woodpecker, grass-green above, pale greenish-grey below, with bright yellow rump, red crown and nape, and black mask around white eye; male has red-centred black moustache. Greyish bill, grey legs.

euhbuz1.name: European Honey-buzzard
euhbuz1.id: Buzzard-like raptor with small pigeon-like head, grey-brown above, variable pale-and-barred underparts and underwings, longish tail with two dark basal bands and one broad subterminal band. Yellow eyes, dark bill.

euhgul1.name: European Herring Gull
euhgul1.id: Large gull with pale grey back and wings, black wingtips with white spots, white head and underparts, stout yellow bill with red gonys spot, pale eye and pink legs.

eupfly1.name: European Pied Flycatcher
eupfly1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
eupfly1.id: Small flycatcher; breeding male glossy black above with white underparts, large white wing patch, white forehead spot and white outer tail. Black bill and legs; female is brown above with smaller wing patch.

eupowl1.name: Eurasian Pygmy-Owl
eupowl1.id: Tiny, small-headed owl, greyish-brown spotted white above, whitish below with brown streaking, faint indistinct facial disc, yellow eyes, white eyebrows, and a relatively long barred tail. Yellowish bill.

eurbla.name: Eurasian Blackbird
eurbla.id: Medium thrush; male entirely glossy black with a bright orange-yellow bill and yellow eye-ring; female dark brown with faintly mottled paler throat and breast, duller bill. Dark legs.

eurbul.name: Eurasian Bullfinch
eurbul.id: Plump finch with black cap, short thick black bill, grey back, black wings with a white wingbar, white rump and black tail; male has rosy-red cheeks and underparts, female greyish-buff below.

eurcoo.name: Eurasian Coot
eurcoo.id: Sooty slate-black waterbird with a glossy black head, white frontal shield and white bill, red eye, and greenish legs with broadly lobed grey toes. Rounded plump body.

eurcrm1.name: Eurasian Crag-Martin
eurcrm1.id: Stocky brown martin, dusky grey-brown above, paler grey-brown below with a darker throat, slightly forked tail showing small white spots near the tip. Dark underwing coverts, small dark bill.

eurcur.name: Eurasian Curlew
eurcur.id: Large brown wader streaked dark on buff, with a very long evenly downcurved bill, plain head without strong stripes, white rump and lower back, and long greyish legs. Emphasise: a long decurved bill, but not exaggeratedly long.

eurdot.name: Eurasian Dotterel
eurdot.id: Plover with grey-brown upperparts, a broad white supercilium meeting in a V on the nape, grey breast bordered below by a narrow white line, chestnut belly and black lower belly patch. Short dark bill, yellowish legs.

eurgol1.name: European Goldfinch
eurgol1.id: Small finch with a bright red face, white cheeks and black-and-white head, warm buff-brown back, and black wings crossed by a broad bright yellow wingbar. Whitish underparts, pale pointed bill.

eurgre1.name: European Greenfinch
eurgre1.id: Stocky finch, olive-green above, yellowish-green below, with bright yellow flashes on the wing edges and at the tail base, grey on wings and face, and a stout pale conical bill. Pinkish legs.

eurgri1.name: Eurasian Griffon
eurgri1.id: Huge pale sandy-brown vulture with a whitish downy head and neck, ruff of pale feathers, contrasting blackish-brown flight feathers and tail, broad wings, and a heavy pale bill.

eurhob.name: Eurasian Hobby
eurhob.id: Slim, scythe-winged falcon, slate-grey above, whitish underparts heavily streaked black, with a dark hood and bold black moustache on white cheeks, and rufous-red thighs and vent. Yellow cere and feet.

eurkes.name: Eurasian Kestrel
eurkes.id: Slender falcon; male has a blue-grey head and tail with a black subterminal band, rufous back spotted black, and buff black-spotted underparts. Female rufous-brown barred above. Yellow cere and feet.

eurlin1.name: Eurasian Linnet
eurlin1.id: Small slim finch, chestnut-brown back, grey head, with a crimson forehead and rosy-red breast on breeding males, white-edged wing and tail feathers, and a small grey conical bill.

eurmag1.name: Eurasian Magpie
eurmag1.id: Unmistakable pied corvid, black head, breast and back, white belly and shoulders, very long iridescent green-blue graduated tail, and dark blue gloss on the wings. Black bill and legs.

eurnut2.name: Eurasian Nuthatch
eurnut2.id: Compact tit-like bird, blue-grey above, with a black eyestripe, white cheeks and throat, and warm buff-orange underparts becoming chestnut on the flanks. Strong straight dark bill, short tail.

eurnut3.name: Northern Nutcracker
eurnut3.id: Chocolate-brown crow boldly spangled with white spots over the body, with a plain dark cap, white undertail coverts, blackish wings and tail, and a long pointed dark bill.

euroys1.name: Eurasian Oystercatcher
euroys1.id: Bold black-and-white wader, black head, breast and upperparts, white belly, broad white wingbar and rump, long straight orange-red bill, red eye, and stout pinkish legs.

eurrob1.name: European Robin
eurrob1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
eurrob1.id: Small plump bird with an orange-red face and breast bordered by blue-grey, brown upperparts, whitish belly, large dark eyes, thin dark bill and a rounded posture on thin dark legs.

eurrol1.name: European Roller
eurrol1.id: Crow-sized, brilliantly coloured bird with a turquoise-blue head and underparts, rich cinnamon-brown back, and bright azure-blue and black wings showing dark flight feathers in flight. Stout dark bill.

eurser1.name: European Serin
eurser1.id: Tiny streaky finch, greenish-yellow with heavy dark streaking on back and flanks, a bright yellow forehead, face and breast, yellow rump, and a very short stubby dark bill.

eursha1.name: European Shag
eursha1.id: Slim glossy greenish-black cormorant-like seabird with a slender neck, steep forehead, thin dark bill with a yellow gape patch, and a short upturned crest on the breeding crown. Dark webbed feet.

eursis.name: Eurasian Siskin
eursis.id: Small streaked yellow-green finch with a black crown and chin (male), bright yellow face, breast and wingbars, dark-streaked flanks, yellow rump, and a fine pointed bill. Forked tail.

eurspo1.name: Eurasian Spoonbill
eurspo1.id: Large all-white wading bird with a long flattened spatulate black bill tipped yellow, black legs, and a shaggy yellowish nuchal crest and yellow breast band in breeding plumage.

eursta.name: European Starling
eursta.id: Glossy black starling with green-and-purple iridescence, spangled with pale buff spots, a pointed yellow bill (breeding) and reddish-pink legs. Short tail, triangular wings.

eurtre1.name: Eurasian Treecreeper
eurtre1.id: Small slender bird, mottled brown above streaked white and buff, with a fine pale supercilium, plain white underparts, a long thin downcurved bill, and a long stiff pointed tail used for climbing.

eurwar1.name: Common Reed Warbler
eurwar1.id: Plain warbler, warm brown above and buff-white below, with an unmarked face except a faint pale supercilium, a sloping forehead, longish pointed bill, and pinkish legs.

eurwar2.name: River Warbler
eurwar2.id: Olive-brown unstreaked warbler with a faintly mottled olive-grey breast band, plain face with weak supercilium, rounded tail, longish undertail coverts, and pinkish legs.

eurwig.name: Eurasian Wigeon
eurwig.id: Compact dabbling duck; male has a chestnut head with a creamy-yellow forehead stripe, pink-grey breast, grey body, white wing patch and a black-and-white stern. Blue-grey bill with black tip.

eurwoo.name: Eurasian Woodcock
eurwoo.id: Plump, long-billed woodland wader, intricately marbled rufous-brown, buff and black for camouflage, with bold dark transverse bars across the crown, large high-set dark eyes, and short pinkish legs.

eurwry.name: Eurasian Wryneck
eurwry.id: Small cryptic woodpecker-relative, intricately barred and vermiculated grey-brown with a dark stripe down the nape and back, finely barred buff underparts, mottled bark-like pattern, and a short pointed bill.

eutdov.name: European Turtle-Dove
eutdov.id: Small slim dove with a scaly chequered black-and-rufous back and wings, blue-grey head, pinkish breast, a striped black-and-white neck patch, and a black tail with a broad white tip. Dark bill, pink legs.

eutkne1.name: Eurasian Thick-knee
eutkne1.id: Cryptic sandy-brown wader streaked darker, with a large rounded head, very large staring yellow eyes, a short black-tipped yellow bill, pale wingbars, and long thick yellowish legs.

eutspa.name: Eurasian Tree Sparrow
eutspa.id: Small sparrow with a chestnut-brown crown, white cheeks marked by a black ear-spot, a small black throat bib, brown-streaked back, pale underparts and a stout grey conical bill. Emphasise: a distinct black spot on the white cheek and a chestnut crown.

ferduc.name: Ferruginous Duck
ferduc.id: Small diving duck, rich mahogany-chestnut head, neck and breast, dark brown back, white belly and undertail coverts, and a striking white iris; blue-grey bill with black tip, broad white wing-stripe in flight.

fieldf.name: Fieldfare
fieldf.id: Large thrush with blue-grey head and rump contrasting chestnut-brown back, blackish tail; warm orange-buff breast heavily spotted black, white belly, dark arrowhead spots on flanks; yellow bill with dark tip.

finwhe1.name: Finsch's Wheatear
finwhe1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
finwhe1.id: Pale wheatear with whitish crown and underparts, black face, throat and wings; broad black inverted-T pattern on white tail; sandy-buff mantle, black bill and legs.

firecr1.name: Common Firecrest
firecr1.id: Tiny kinglet, bright olive-green above, whitish below; bold white supercilium over black eyestripe, white below eye; flame-orange crown stripe bordered black, bronze shoulder patch, two white wingbars; thin black bill. Crown stripe flame-orange bordered black; two clear white wing-bars. Emphasise: a compact shape with bold black-and-white face stripes and greenish wings with pale wing-bars.

fuwduc.name: Fulvous Whistling-Duck
fuwduc.id: Tawny-orange goose-like duck with long neck and legs; rich cinnamon head, neck and underparts, dark brown back scaled buff, creamy-white flank stripes and U-shaped white uppertail band; dark grey bill and legs. Emphasise: smaller eyes.

gadwal.name: Gadwall
gadwal.id: Grey dabbling duck, finely vermiculated grey body, scaled grey breast, black rear end; brown head, white speculum patch on wing; dark grey bill, dull yellow legs.

gargan.name: Garganey
gargan.id: Small dabbling duck, brown head with bold broad white crescent stripe from eye to nape; mottled brown breast, grey flanks, pale grey-blue forewing; dark bill, grey legs. Emphasise: finely vermiculated grey flanks.

garwar1.name: Garden Warbler
garwar1.id: Plump featureless warbler, uniform olive-brown above, pale buff-grey below; rounded head with plain face, faint pale eye-ring, no wingbars or strong markings; stout grey bill, blue-grey legs. Emphasise: plain unmarked plumage with no wing-bars and only a faint greyish wash on the neck and chin.

gbbgul.name: Great Black-backed Gull
gbbgul.id: Very large gull with massive yellow bill (red gonys spot), blackish-slate back and wings, white head, underparts and tail; pinkish legs, pale eye.

gbhgul2.name: Pallas's Gull
gbhgul2.id: Large pale gull, white body, pale grey back and wings with black wingtips; in breeding has black hood with white crescents above and below eye; stout yellow bill with black ring and red tip, yellow legs.

glagul.name: Glaucous Gull
glagul.id: Large pale gull, pale grey back and wings with no black, white wingtips, white head and underparts; heavy yellow bill with red gonys spot, pale eye, pink legs. Emphasise: a pale white-winged gull with no black in the wingtips or tail.

gloibi.name: Glossy Ibis
gloibi.id: Slender dark wading bird, deep maroon-chestnut head, neck and body with green-bronze iridescent gloss on wings and back; long downcurved grey bill, dark legs.

gnwtea.name: Green-winged Teal
gnwtea.id: Tiny dabbling duck, chestnut head with broad green eye-patch bordered cream, vertical white bar on grey flanks; grey vermiculated body, buff-edged black undertail, green-and-black speculum; dark bill, grey legs.

goldcr1.name: Goldcrest
goldcr1.id: Tiny rounded warbler, olive-green above, pale buff below; large dark eye on plain face; yellow crown stripe (orange-centred) bordered black, two white wingbars; very thin black bill.

goleag.name: Golden Eagle
goleag.id: Huge dark brown eagle with golden-buff crown and nape, long broad wings, longish tail; pale patches at wing base in flight; massive hooked grey-and-yellow bill, fully feathered legs, yellow feet.

gragoo.name: Graylag Goose
gragoo.id: Large bulky grey-brown goose, paler greyish forewing and pale-fringed feathers; pale head and neck, whitish belly; heavy orange bill, pink legs.

graher1.name: Gray Heron
graher1.id: Tall grey heron, grey back and wings, white head and neck with black eyestripe extending to thin crest; black-streaked white foreneck, dagger-like yellow bill, long legs.

grapri1.name: Graceful Prinia
grapri1.id: Tiny slim warbler, pale sandy grey-brown above, whitish below; very long graduated tail with black-and-white tips; faint pale supercilium, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.

grcgre1.name: Great Crested Grebe
grcgre1.id: Slender long-necked grebe, brown-grey back, white face and underparts, long white neck; black double crest and chestnut-and-black ear tufts (frills) on face; long pink-and-dark dagger bill, red eye. Emphasise: correct head colouring with chestnut-and-black head plumes.

grebit1.name: Eurasian Bittern
grebit1.id: Stocky bittern, warm golden-buff plumage heavily mottled and streaked black-brown; blackish crown, dark moustache; long greenish-yellow dagger bill, greenish legs. Emphasise: vertical brown streaking rather than spots, and a bulky heron shape.

grebus1.name: Great Bustard
grebus1.id: Huge heavy bustard, sandy-rufous back barred black, white belly; pale blue-grey head and neck, long white moustache-like throat whiskers in male; thick neck, stout pale bill, sturdy grey legs.

grecor.name: Great Cormorant
grecor.id: Large blackish waterbird glossed bronze-green, white chin and cheek patch, yellow bare facial skin; thick hooked grey bill, black legs; often shows white thigh patch in breeding.

greegr.name: Great Egret
greegr.id: Tall all-white heron, slender long neck, long black-and-yellow dagger bill (yellow in non-breeding); long blackish legs and feet, no plumes on head.

grefla3.name: Greater Flamingo
grefla3.id: Very tall pink-tinged wading bird, pale pink-white body with bright rose-pink wing coverts, black flight feathers; long S-curved neck, downward-kinked pink bill with black tip, very long pink legs.

gresca.name: Greater Scaup
gresca.id: Diving duck, glossy green-black head, black breast and rear, white flanks, pale grey vermiculated back; rounded head, broad pale blue-grey bill with black nail, yellow eye.

greshe.name: Great Shearwater
greshe.id: Large shearwater, dark brown-grey above with pale-scaled back, white below; blackish-brown cap sharply cut off from white cheeks and white nape collar, dark belly smudge, white uppertail band; long dark bill.

gresku1.name: Great Skua
gresku1.id: Bulky brown skua, dark rufous-brown plumage streaked paler, with bold white wing-flashes at base of primaries; heavy hooked dark bill, dark legs. Emphasise: a stout gull-like bill, not a falcon-like hooked beak.

gresni1.name: Great Snipe
gresni1.id: Stocky snipe, richly patterned brown back with buff stripes, barred buff underparts; bold white-tipped outer tail feathers, dark-streaked head with stripes; long straight dark bill, greenish legs. Emphasise: a clearly barred face and bold pale stripes along the back.

gretit1.name: Great Tit
gretit1.id: Bold tit, glossy black head with large white cheek patches, black throat and broad black central belly stripe; yellow underparts, olive-green back, blue-grey wings with white wingbar; black bill, grey legs.

grewar3.name: Greenish Warbler
grewar3.id: Small slim leaf warbler, plain greyish-green above, whitish below; long whitish supercilium, dark eyestripe, one thin pale wingbar; fine dark bill with pale base, dark legs. Emphasise: a single thin wing-bar, not bold.

grewhi1.name: Greater Whitethroat
grewhi1.id: Slim warbler with grey-brown head, rufous-edged wings, brown back, white throat contrasting buff-pink breast and white belly; pale eye-ring, white outer tail feathers; dark bill, pale brownish legs. Emphasise: a peaked head shape, grey head, rusty wing panel and white throat.

grgowl.name: Great Gray Owl
grgowl.id: Very large grey owl with huge rounded facial disc marked with concentric grey rings, no ear tufts; small yellow eyes, white bow-tie marking on throat; mottled grey-brown body, yellow bill.

bargoo.name: Barnacle Goose
bargoo.id: Boldly patterned goose with creamy-white face, black crown, neck, breast and bill. Silvery-grey back barred black and white, white belly and flanks, black legs. Compact build. A thin black line runs from the base of the bill to the eye. Emphasise: a dark stripe running back from the base of the bill.

465888.name: Pale Crag-Martin
465888.id: Small stocky swallow-like bird with sandy grey-brown upperparts and paler buff-grey underparts, lacking strong contrast. Short slightly forked tail showing small white spots near tip when spread; blackish underwing coverts. Dark eye, short black bill, dark legs.

atlfly1.name: Atlas Flycatcher
atlfly1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
atlfly1.id: Striking black-and-white flycatcher; male glossy black above and pure white below, with large white wing patch, white forehead patch, and a white rump band. Small black bill, dark legs.

balshe1.name: Balearic Shearwater
balshe1.id: Medium shearwater with dull brown upperparts and dirty buff-brown underparts, smudgy under-tail and vent. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs; long narrow wings held stiff. Overall drab muddy brown coloration.

bktgod.name: Black-tailed Godwit
bktgod.id: Tall elegant wader; breeding adult orange-rufous head, neck and breast, barred lower belly, grey-brown back. Long straight bill pink at base with dark tip; black tail-band over white rump, long dark legs. The head is plain orange-rufous with no black markings on the head. The long straight bill is pinkish at the base with a dark/black tip. Emphasise: a plain head without black, and a long straight bill, pinkish at the base with a dark tip.

blwpra1.name: Black-winged Pratincole
blwpra1.id: Slim tern-like wader, warm brown above and on the breast with a black-bordered creamy throat patch, white belly, and forked tail. Diagnostic blackish underwing-coverts, short red-based dark bill, long dark legs.

boowar1.name: Booted Warbler
boowar1.id: Tiny pale warbler, sandy grey-brown above and creamy-white below, with a short pale supercilium and dark eye-line, plus a faintly dark-bordered crown. Short fine bill with pale base, pale legs; small rounded body with short tail.

brambl.name: Brambling
brambl.id: Finch with orange breast and shoulders, blackish head and back (mottled in winter), and a white belly. Bold white rump conspicuous in flight, dark wings with orange and white bars, stout pale or dark-tipped bill, pinkish legs.

bripet.name: European Storm-Petrel
bripet.id: Tiny blackish storm-petrel with a square white rump patch and white underwing bar, otherwise sooty all over. Short rounded wings, square tail, small black bill with tubenose, black legs and feet.

cirbun1.name: Cirl Bunting
cirbun1.id: Bunting with an olive-grey breast band and yellow underparts; male head has a black throat and eye-stripe with yellow supercilium and cheeks. Streaked chestnut back, rufous flanks streaked dark, grey rump, stout greyish bill.

cogwar1.name: Common Grasshopper Warbler
cogwar1.id: Small skulking warbler, olive-brown above heavily streaked dark on crown, back and rump, with paler buff streaked breast. Faint pale supercilium, plain undertail, rounded graduated tail, fine pointed bill, pinkish legs. Emphasise: no wing-bars.

colfly1.name: Collared Flycatcher
colfly1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
colfly1.id: Black-and-white flycatcher; male glossy black above with a broad white collar around the neck, large white wing patch, white forehead, and pure white underparts. Round head. White rump, small flat black bill, dark legs.

colpra.name: Collared Pratincole
colpra.id: Slim tern-like wader, sandy-brown above and on the breast with a black-bordered creamy throat patch, white belly, and deeply forked tail. Chestnut underwing-coverts, red-based dark bill, short dark legs. A thin black line borders the creamy throat, curving back from the bill below the eye.

comchi1.name: Common Chiffchaff
comchi1.id: Tiny plain warbler, dull olive-brown above and off-white washed buff below, with a faint pale supercilium and pale eye-ring. Fine dark bill, blackish legs distinguishing it; short rounded wings, frequently dipped tail. Plumage smooth and plain with little feather detail; legs and feet distinctly dark. No red or yellow tones. Emphasise: plain olive-brown plumage with minimal feather detail, dark legs and feet, and no red or yellow tones.

comcuc.name: Common Cuckoo
comcuc.id: Slim grey bird with a long graduated white-spotted tail, grey head and breast, and white underparts finely barred grey. Pointed falcon-like wings, yellow eye-ring and feet, slightly downcurved dark bill with yellow base.

comeid.name: Common Eider
comeid.id: Large heavy sea-duck; male white above with a black crown, pale green nape, white breast washed pink, and black flanks, belly and tail. Wedge-shaped grey-green bill sloping into forehead, dark legs. Face shows the pale sea-green nape patch clearly; natural side-on orientation.

comgol.name: Common Goldeneye
comgol.id: Compact diving duck; male with a glossy green-black rounded head, a round white spot before the golden-yellow eye, white body, and black back. Black-and-white wings, short dark bill, yellow-orange legs. Body slightly longer and more elongated.

comgre.name: Common Greenshank
comgre.id: Tall pale grey-brown wader, greyish above mottled darker, with a white belly and streaked breast. Long slightly upturned bill grey with a dark tip, long greenish legs, white rump and lower back wedge in flight. The longish grey-green bill is slightly upturned. Bill clearly slightly upturned; feet fully shown. Emphasise: a very slightly upturned bill.

commer.name: Common Merganser
commer.id: Large slim sawbill; male with a glossy green-black head, a thin red hooked bill, white body washed pink, and a black back. Long low profile, dark wings with a large white patch, red legs. Beak slim long with rounded upper part at tip.

commoo3.name: Eurasian Moorhen
commoo3.id: Medium dark slate-grey waterbird with brownish back, a bright red frontal shield and red bill tipped yellow, a broken white line along the flanks, white undertail coverts split by black, and long greenish-yellow legs with very long toes.

commur.name: Common Murre
commur.id: Slim black-and-white auk with dark chocolate-brown head, neck and upperparts, clean white underparts, a long pointed black bill, thin white trailing edge to the wing, and dark legs set far back.

comqua1.name: Common Quail
comqua1.id: Tiny rotund streaky game-bird, sandy-brown above with cream streaks, buff underparts, a bold cream crown-stripe and supercilium, dark eyestripe, pale throat bordered by dark anchor marks, and pale legs. Face boldly patterned with cream and dark anchor markings. Emphasise: the correct face pattern with pale stripes and a dark throat anchor.

comred1.name: Common Redshank
comred1.id: Medium grey-brown wader, streaked above and on the breast, with bright orange-red legs and a straight red-based black-tipped bill; in flight shows a broad white trailing wing-bar and white rump wedge.

comred2.name: Common Redstart
comred2.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
comred2.id: Slim chat with blue-grey crown and back, black face and throat, white forehead, bright orange-red breast and flanks, and a rusty-orange rump and quivering tail; thin black bill and dark legs.

comsan.name: Common Sandpiper
comsan.id: Small brown wader with olive-brown upperparts, clean white underparts forming a distinctive white wedge in front of the bent wing, fine breast streaking, a white eye-ring, pale straight bill and greenish legs; constantly teetering rear.

comsni.name: Common Snipe
comsni.id: Cryptic wader, richly mottled brown above with bold cream back-stripes, dark crown split by a pale central stripe, heavily barred flanks, a very long straight bill and short greenish legs.

comswi.name: Common Swift
comswi.id: All sooty-black aerial bird with a pale greyish throat patch, very long slender scythe-shaped swept-back wings, a short forked tail and a tiny black bill; streamlined cigar-shaped body. Head held low in line with the streamlined body, not rounded. Plumage only sooty brown-black with a slightly tan-tinged whitish throat; no other colours. Emphasise: only sooty brown-black tones with a slightly paler throat, and no other colours.

crebun2.name: Cretzschmar's Bunting
crebun2.id: Bunting with a blue-grey head and breast, a rusty-orange throat and eye-ring, warm rufous-brown streaked back, pinkish belly and a pinkish conical bill; like Ortolan but with grey throat. Head blue-grey with a rusty-orange throat; bill short, conical and pinkish. Emphasise: the correct head and bill shape, with emphasis on overall body proportions.

cursan.name: Curlew Sandpiper
cursan.id: Slim wader with a long down-curved black bill, in breeding plumage rich brick-red on the head, underparts and back which is also scaled black, and a white rump; black legs, longer-legged and longer-billed than Dunlin. Emphasise: precise, accurate plumage colouring and a decurved bill.

cypwar1.name: Cyprus Warbler
cypwar1.id: Small dark Sylvia-type warbler, slate-grey above, with a black head and heavy black scaling spotting on the white throat and breast, a red eye-ring and pale iris, and a long blackish white-edged tail.

delpri1.name: Delicate Prinia
delpri1.id: Tiny pale sandy-grey prinia, faintly streaked above, with whitish underparts, a pale supercilium, a slim dark bill, pinkish legs and a long graduated tail tipped white; slender and long-tailed. Plumage colouring rougher and more streaked, less smooth. Emphasise: rougher, less smooth colouring.

doveki.name: Dovekie
doveki.id: Very small chubby auk, black above and white below, with a tiny stubby black bill, a black head and breast, white belly and short neck; tubby compact shape with dark legs.

dunlin.name: Dunlin
dunlin.id: Small wader with a black belly patch in breeding plumage, a rufous-and-black scaled back, streaked whitish breast, a slightly down-curved black bill, black legs and a faint white wing-bar; hunched posture. Bill clearly fine and slightly down-curved; plumage cold-toned with little buff.

duswar.name: Dusky Warbler
duswar.id: Small plain dark warbler, dull grey-brown above and buffish-white below with buff flanks, a long buff supercilium, a dark eyestripe, a fine dark bill and dark legs; lacks any wing-bars. Underparts and flanks warmer and buffier. Emphasise: warmer buff-brown tones.

eabwar1.name: Eastern Bonelli's Warbler
eabwar1.id: Small pale leaf-warbler, greenish-grey above with a yellowish-green rump and wing-panel, plain whitish underparts, a plain face with a faint pale eye-ring, a pale lower mandible and dark legs. Emphasise: an improved, correct slim warbler shape.

eaowar2.name: Eastern Orphean Warbler
eaowar2.id: Largish robust Sylvia warbler, grey above with a dark grey-black hood, whitish underparts with a peach wash on the flanks, a pale staring yellow eye, a strong bill and white outer tail feathers. Plumage cold grey with no brown tones.

euptit1.name: Eurasian Penduline-Tit
euptit1.id: Tiny tit with a black mask through the eye, pale grey head, chestnut back, whitish underparts with rusty wash, and a fine sharply pointed grey bill.

eurjac.name: Eurasian Jackdaw
eurjac.id: Small compact crow, sooty black with a pale silvery-grey nape and ear-coverts, and a striking pale whitish-grey eye. Short black bill and black legs. Overall darker and sootier with subtle, low contrast. Emphasise: darker overall with low contrast and only a subtle grey nape.

eurjay1.name: Eurasian Jay
eurjay1.id: Pinkish-brown crow with a streaked black-and-white crown, black moustache, white rump, black tail, and a brilliant blue-and-black barred patch on the wing. Black bill, white throat. Crown finely streaked black-and-white, head colouring accurate. Emphasise: correct head colouring, a pinkish-buff crown with fine black streaks.

eurnig1.name: Eurasian Nightjar
eurnig1.id: Cryptic, intricately mottled grey-brown bird with a flat broad head, very large dark eyes, tiny bill with a wide gape, long wings and long tail; males show white spots near wingtips and tail corners. Bill tiny with a very wide gape. Emphasise: a tiny flat bill with a very wide gape.

eursco1.name: Eurasian Scops-Owl
eursco1.id: Tiny grey owl with intricately vermiculated bark-like grey-brown plumage, small ear tufts, yellow eyes, fine dark streaking below, and a pale scapular line. Greyish bill, feathered legs.

eurspa1.name: Eurasian Sparrowhawk
eurspa1.id: Small short-winged hawk with long yellow legs and yellow eyes; male slate-grey above with fine rusty barring below, female grey-brown above with grey barring below. Long barred tail.

grnsan.name: Green Sandpiper
grnsan.id: Medium sandpiper, very dark greenish-brown back finely speckled white, white belly; bold white rump and barred tail in flight, dark underwing; short white supercilium before eye, white eye-ring; dark bill, greenish legs.

grnwar1.name: Green Warbler
grnwar1.id: Small leaf warbler, bright greenish above, clean whitish below with yellow wash on face and throat; long yellowish supercilium, dark eyestripe, two pale wingbars; fine bill with orange lower mandible, pale legs. Emphasise: no yellow tones.

grnwoo3.name: Iberian Green Woodpecker
grnwoo3.id: Green woodpecker, olive-green back, yellowish-green rump, pale grey-green underparts; grey head with red crown, narrow black around eye, red-centred black moustache; pale eye, greenish bill.

grrwar1.name: Great Reed Warbler
grrwar1.id: Large bulky reed warbler, warm brown above, buff-white below with buffy flanks; broad pale supercilium, peaked crown, sturdy build; strong dark bill with pale base, grey legs.

grscuc1.name: Great Spotted Cuckoo
grscuc1.id: Large slim cuckoo, grey-brown back and wings boldly spotted white, long white-edged tail; grey crested cap, pale buff face and throat, creamy-white underparts; longish dark bill.

grseag1.name: Greater Spotted Eagle
grseag1.id: Large dark brown eagle, uniformly dark chocolate-brown plumage, slightly paler nape, broad rounded wings; pale U-shaped band on uppertail coverts, dark bill with yellow cere, feathered legs, yellow feet.

grswoo.name: Great Spotted Woodpecker
grswoo.id: Pied woodpecker, black back with large white shoulder patches, black-and-white barred wings; white underparts, bright red vent; black crown (red nape patch in male), white face with black moustache; grey bill.

grwpel1.name: Great White Pelican
grwpel1.id: Huge white pelican with pinkish-white plumage, black underwing flight feathers; large pinkish-yellow throat pouch, long pale bill, yellowish gular skin and forehead; pinkish legs.

grypar.name: Gray Partridge
grypar.id: Plump round partridge, grey breast and neck finely barred, brown-streaked back, chestnut-barred flanks; orange-buff face, dark horseshoe belly patch; short grey bill, greyish legs. Emphasise: an orange face, finely barred grey underparts and a dark belly horseshoe.

grywag.name: Gray Wagtail
grywag.id: Slim long-tailed wagtail, blue-grey back and head, yellow rump and bright yellow underparts (vivid on undertail); white supercilium, white wingbar, blackish wings; black bill, pinkish legs. Emphasise: a blue-grey head with a white supercilium and white moustachial stripe, and yellow underparts.

gstlar1.name: Greater Short-toed Lark
gstlar1.id: Small pale lark, sandy-brown streaked back, plain whitish underparts with dark patch at side of neck; pale supercilium, peaked crown, short stubby pale bill; pale legs, white outer tail feathers.

gubter2.name: Gull-billed Tern
gubter2.id: Stout pale tern, pale grey back and wings, white underparts; full black cap in breeding; thick gull-like all-black bill, long black legs, short forked tail.

gwfgoo.name: Greater White-fronted Goose
gwfgoo.id: Grey-brown goose with white blaze around base of bill, black irregular barring on belly; barred brown back, white undertail; pink-orange bill, orange legs.

gyfwoo1.name: Gray-headed Woodpecker
gyfwoo1.id: Green woodpecker, olive-green back, yellow-green rump, pale grey head and underparts; small red forehead patch, thin black moustache and dark lores; pale eye, slender grey bill.

gyhchi.name: Gray-headed Chickadee
gyhchi.id: Brownish tit, dull brown cap, large white cheeks, blackish bib; grey-brown back, buff flanks, whitish underparts; short dark bill, dark legs.

gyrfal.name: Gyrfalcon
gyrfal.id: Large powerful falcon, pale grey-white plumage variably barred and spotted dark grey above, white below with dark streaking; broad pointed wings, yellow cere and feet, dark hooked bill, faint moustache. Emphasise: a diffuse grey moustache rather than a strong black one, and a bulky, slightly hunched look from large wing muscles.

harduc.name: Harlequin Duck
harduc.id: Striking small duck, slate-blue body with bold white crescents and spots edged black, chestnut flanks; white face patch, white crown stripe; small dark bill, grey legs.

hawfin.name: Hawfinch
hawfin.id: Large bull-necked finch, warm orange-brown body, grey neck collar, black throat patch; massive conical silver-grey bill, black-and-white wings with blue gloss, white wing patch and white tail tip.

hazgro1.name: Hazel Grouse
hazgro1.id: Small plump grouse with intricately marbled grey-brown plumage barred chestnut, black and white; male has a black throat patch bordered white, short crest, grey tail with broad black subterminal band, and a red eye-comb. Short dark bill, feathered legs.

hoocro1.name: Hooded Crow
hoocro1.id: Large crow with pale ash-grey body and contrasting glossy black head, throat, wings and tail. Stout black bill, black legs. Robust build with a square tail; the grey-and-black two-tone pattern is unmistakable.

hoomer.name: Hooded Merganser
hoomer.id: Small slim sawbill with a huge fan-shaped white crest bordered black, black head and back, white breast crossed by two black bars, and rich cinnamon flanks. Thin black serrated bill, yellow eye. Compact body, long stiff tail.

hoopoe.name: Common Hoopoe
hoopoe.id: Pinkish-cinnamon body with a bold black-and-white barred back, wings and tail. Erectile fan crest is cinnamon tipped black-and-white. Long thin slightly down-curved blackish bill, short greyish legs. Broad rounded wings boldly barred black and white.

horgre.name: Horned Grebe
horgre.id: Small grebe in breeding dress: black head with golden-yellow ear-tufts fanning back from the red eye, chestnut neck and flanks, blackish back. Short straight black bill with pale tip, flat-crowned peaked head. Dark legs set far back.

horlar.name: Horned Lark
horlar.id: Sandy-brown lark with a striking black-and-yellow face: yellow throat and forehead, black mask and breast-band, and small black 'horn' feather tufts on the crown. Pinkish-brown back, white belly, dark tail edged white. Thin dark bill.

houbun3.name: House Bunting
houbun3.id: Small grey-headed bunting with fine blackish head streaking, rich rufous-chestnut back, wings and tail, and pale greyish underparts washed cinnamon. Short conical pinkish bill, pinkish legs. Plain face lacking strong markings; warm rusty body tones.

houspa.name: House Sparrow
houspa.id: Stocky sparrow; male has grey crown, chestnut-brown nape and back streaked black, grey cheeks, black bib, and pale grey underparts. White wing-bar on chestnut wings. Stout conical black bill, pinkish-brown legs. Plain whitish-buff face.

humwar1.name: Hume's Warbler
humwar1.id: Tiny dull olive-grey warbler with whitish underparts, a long buff supercilium, dark eyestripe, and a single narrow pale wing-bar. Greyish crown with faint paler median stripe. Thin dark bill with pale base, dark legs. Compact, short-tailed.

ibechi2.name: Iberian Chiffchaff
ibechi2.id: Tiny olive-green warbler with yellowish supercilium and throat, greyer crown and nape, and whitish belly washed yellow. Fine dark bill, dark legs. Slim and active; very similar to Common Chiffchaff but slightly brighter yellow-and-green tones. No yellow anywhere in the plumage.

ibgshr1.name: Iberian Gray Shrike
ibgshr1.id: Pale grey shrike with a bold black mask through the eye, white throat and pinkish-white underparts, black wings with a small white patch, and black tail edged white. Stout hooked black bill, black legs. Slender long-tailed silhouette.

ictwar1.name: Icterine Warbler
ictwar1.id: Medium warbler with plain greyish-green upperparts and lemon-yellow underparts, a pale yellow supercilium, and a pale wing-panel on the closed wing. Peaked crown, long stout pinkish-based bill, blue-grey legs. Long primary projection, sleek build.

impeag1.name: Imperial Eagle
impeag1.id: Large dark-brown eagle with a contrasting pale golden-buff crown and nape, white shoulder braces (scapular spots), and a greyish tail with broad dark terminal band. Yellow cere and feet, dark hooked bill. Long broad wings, heavy build.

itaspa1.name: Italian Sparrow
itaspa1.id: Sparrow with a chestnut crown and nape, clean white cheeks, black bib, grey rump, and pale whitish underparts. Chestnut back streaked black, white wing-bar. Stout conical bill, pinkish legs. Brighter, cleaner-faced than House Sparrow.

ivogul.name: Ivory Gull
ivogul.id: Wholly pure white gull with no markings, a rounded dove-like head, and dark eye. Short bluish bill tipped yellow-orange, and short black legs. Compact pigeon-like body; the all-white plumage with black legs is diagnostic.

jacsni.name: Jack Snipe
jacsni.id: Small short-billed snipe with dark glossy purple-and-green back showing bold creamy-buff stripes, dark crown lacking a central pale stripe, and a split supercilium. Streaked buff breast, white belly, wedge-shaped pointed tail. Yellowish legs, fairly short straight bill.

kenplo1.name: Kentish Plover
kenplo1.id: Small pale sandy-brown plover with white underparts and forehead, a thin black frontal bar and eye-patch, and incomplete dark side breast-patches (no full band). Rufous tinge to crown. Slender black bill, blackish or grey legs. Slim, large-eyed.

kineid.name: King Eider
kineid.id: Large sea-duck; male has a pale blue-grey crown and nape, green wash on cheeks, an orange frontal shield with red bill, white breast and black body. Black back with white shoulder patch. Heavy wedge-shaped head profile, stocky build.

krunut1.name: Krüper's Nuthatch
krunut1.id: Small compact nuthatch with blue-grey upperparts, a black eyestripe and cap-edge, whitish throat, and buffy underparts marked by a large rufous-chestnut patch on the upper breast. Straight pointed grey bill, short tail, sturdy grey legs.

lammer1.name: Bearded Vulture
lammer1.id: Huge slender vulture with a small head; pale creamy-orange head, neck and underparts contrasting with dark slate-grey wings and back. Black mask and bristly 'beard' below the bill, red eye-ring. Long narrow pointed wings and long wedge-shaped tail.

lanwar.name: Lanceolated Warbler
lanwar.id: Small skulking warbler with olive-brown upperparts boldly streaked blackish, including streaked rump and breast, and pale buff underparts with dark malar streaks. Faint pale supercilium, rounded tail. Fine dark bill, pinkish legs. Heavily streaked overall.

laplon.name: Lapland Longspur
laplon.id: Streaky brown bunting-like bird; breeding male has a black face and throat bordered by a white-then-buff stripe, a chestnut-red nape, and white belly with streaked flanks. Brown back streaked black, yellowish bill. Long hind claw, short pinkish legs.

laudov1.name: Laughing Dove
laudov1.id: Slim long-tailed dove with a pinkish head and breast, rufous-brown back, and a distinctive black-spotted rusty 'necklace' patch on the lower throat. Bluish-grey wing panels, white-tipped tail edges. Small dark bill, reddish legs. Soft warm tones.

lbbgul.name: Lesser Black-backed Gull
lbbgul.id: Large gull with a slate-grey back and wings (black wingtips with small white spots), white head and underparts, and white tail. Yellow bill with red gonys spot, yellow legs, pale eye. Streamlined; the dark grey mantle with yellow legs is key.

lcspet.name: Leach's Storm-Petrel
lcspet.id: Small dark sooty-brown storm-petrel with a white rump (often with a faint grey central line), a pale brown bar across the upperwing coverts, and a forked tail. Slim black bill, black legs. Long angular wings; buoyant build.

legshr2.name: Lesser Gray Shrike
legshr2.id: Pale grey shrike with a broad black mask extending across the forehead, white underparts washed pink, black wings with a white patch, and black tail edged white. Pale grey crown and back. Short stout hooked black bill, black legs.

leseag1.name: Lesser Spotted Eagle
leseag1.id: Medium brown eagle with fairly uniform pale greyish-brown plumage, slightly darker flight feathers and a paler head and upperwing coverts. Yellow cere and feet, dark hooked bill, dark eye. Broad rounded wings, short tail; rather plain plumage.

leskes1.name: Lesser Kestrel
leskes1.id: Small slender falcon; male has an unmarked brick-red back, blue-grey head, blue-grey greater coverts on the wing, and pinkish-buff underparts lightly spotted. Blue-grey tail with black band. Pale (whitish) claws, yellow cere and feet, short hooked bill.

leswhi4.name: Lesser Whitethroat
leswhi4.id: Small grey-and-white warbler with a grey crown, darker grey ear-coverts (mask-like), greyish-brown back, and clean white underparts. White throat, dark legs, short blackish bill. Compact and neat; the contrasting dark cheek patch is distinctive.

lesyel.name: Lesser Yellowlegs
lesyel.id: Slim elegant wader with greyish-brown back finely spotted white, streaked neck and breast, white belly, and a square white rump. Long bright yellow legs, a straight thin dark bill about head-length. Slender neck, fine proportions.

levspa1.name: Levant Sparrowhawk
levspa1.id: Small slim hawk; male has blue-grey upperparts, very pale whitish underparts with faint rufous barring, blackish wingtips, and a grey tail with dark bands. Dark eye (not yellow), yellow cere and legs. Pointed wingtips, slender build.

levwoo1.name: Levaillant's Woodpecker
levwoo1.id: Green woodpecker with yellowish-green back, pale grey-green underparts faintly barred on the belly, and a greyish face. Red crown extends to the nape; black moustache. Greenish-yellow rump, dark-tipped bill, greyish legs. Long stout grey bill.

lirplo.name: Little Ringed Plover
lirplo.id: Small plover with brown upperparts, white underparts, and a single complete black breast-band; black-and-white forehead pattern and a bright yellow eye-ring. Black bill, dull pinkish to flesh-coloured legs. Slim, large-headed; the yellow eye-ring is diagnostic.

litbit1.name: Little Bittern
litbit1.id: Tiny heron; male has a black crown and back, large buff wing-coverts forming a pale oval panel, and buff neck and underparts. Greenish-yellow dagger bill and yellow legs. Slim long-necked build; the contrasting black back and pale wing-patch stand out.

litbun.name: Little Bunting
litbun.id: Small bunting with a chestnut crown bordered by black lateral stripes, chestnut ear-coverts outlined black, a pale eye-ring, and a whitish 'spot' behind the cheek. Whitish underparts streaked black on breast and flanks. Small dark conical bill, pinkish legs.

litcra1.name: Little Crake
litcra1.id: Tiny slim crake; male has slate-grey face and underparts, olive-brown back streaked black with fine white spots, and barred buff-and-white undertail. Short green bill with a red spot at the base, green legs with long toes. Long tail held cocked.

litegr.name: Little Egret
litegr.id: Slender all-white heron with a long thin neck, slim black dagger bill, black legs and contrasting bright yellow feet. Fine drooping plumes on the nape, breast and back in breeding dress. Elegant, graceful build with sharp angular profile.

litgre1.name: Little Grebe
litgre1.id: Small dumpy grebe with dark brown upperparts, chestnut cheeks and neck, dark crown, and a pale yellowish-green patch at the gape base. Short stubby dark bill with pale tip, fluffy rounded rear. Dark legs set far back; rounded, almost tailless shape.

litgul.name: Little Gull
litgul.id: Smallest gull, very small and tern-like, with a jet-black hood (breeding), pale grey upperparts, white underparts washed pink, and rounded wings showing blackish underwings. Short dark-red bill, red legs. Buoyant, delicate build; no black wingtips above.

litowl1.name: Little Owl
litowl1.id: Small flat-headed owl with greyish-brown upperparts boldly spotted white, whitish underparts streaked brown, and pale 'eyebrows' over fierce yellow eyes giving a frowning look. Short pale bill, feathered whitish legs. Squat, short-tailed, large-headed.

litshe1.name: Barolo Shearwater
litshe1.id: Small black-and-white shearwater with blackish upperparts and clean white underparts, white face extending above the eye, and white undertail-coverts. Thin dark bill, bluish legs. Compact, fast-fluttering build; black-capped appearance with white surrounds.

litsti.name: Little Stint
litsti.id: Tiny short-billed stint; breeding adult has rufous-fringed black-centred back feathers forming pale 'V' braces, a rufous-washed streaked breast, white belly and throat. Fine straight black bill, black legs. Diminutive, large-headed, quick.

litter1.name: Little Tern
litter1.id: Tiny pale tern with a black cap and white forehead, pale grey back and wings, and white underparts. Yellow bill tipped black, orange-yellow legs. Narrow pointed wings with a dark leading edge to the outer primaries; slim, fast-looking build.

lobdow.name: Long-billed Dowitcher
lobdow.id: Medium snipe-like wader with greyish-brown upperparts (rufous-edged in breeding), reddish underparts barred on flanks, and a very long straight dark bill. White wedge up the back, greenish legs. Stocky body, short neck; sewing-machine feeding profile.

loeowl.name: Long-eared Owl
loeowl.id: Slim upright owl with mottled grey-brown plumage, vertically streaked underparts, long close-set ear-tufts, and a rusty-orange facial disc with bright orange eyes. Dark X-pattern across the face. Hooked dark bill, feathered legs. Slender, elongated shape.

lolbuz1.name: Long-legged Buzzard
lolbuz1.id: Large pale buzzard with a sandy-buff head and breast, rufous-tinged underparts, an unmarked pale rusty tail, and dark belly patch. Pale wings with dark wingtips and a dark carpal patch. Yellow cere and feet, hooked dark bill. Long-winged, lanky build.

lotduc.name: Long-tailed Duck
lotduc.id: Small sea-duck; breeding male is dark brown and white with a white face patch around the eye, dark cheek-patch, and very long slender pointed black tail-streamers. Pink band across the dark bill, blackish breast, white flanks. Compact, round-headed.

lotjae.name: Long-tailed Jaeger
lotjae.id: Slender graceful skua with grey-brown upperparts, a neat black cap, pale yellowish neck-sides, and clean white breast shading to grey belly. Very long pointed central tail-streamers. Short dark bill, dark legs. Elegant, tern-like flight silhouette.

lottit1.name: Long-tailed Tit
lottit1.id: Tiny fluffy ball-shaped tit with a very long narrow tail. Whitish head (or with black lateral crown-stripes), blackish back, pinkish scapulars and flanks, and whitish underparts. Tiny stubby black bill, dark legs. Round body, long thin tail.

lwfgoo.name: Lesser White-fronted Goose
lwfgoo.id: Small compact grey-brown goose with a large white forehead blaze extending above the eye, bold black belly blotches, pink bill, and orange legs; bright yellow eye-ring is diagnostic, and folded wingtips extend past the short tail.

mallar3.name: Mallard
mallar3.id: Drake has a glossy bottle-green head, white neck-ring, yellow bill, chestnut-brown breast, grey body, black rear with curled central tail feathers, and orange legs; blue speculum bordered white shows on the wing.

manduc.name: Mandarin Duck
manduc.id: Ornate drake with orange flared 'sail' feathers on the back, purple breast with white stripes, golden-buff flanks, a green-and-white crested head with broad white eye-stripe, red bill, and orange legs.

manshe.name: Manx Shearwater
manshe.id: Slim black-and-white tubenose shearwater; clean blackish-brown above and pure white below from chin to undertail, with a dark cap reaching below the eye, narrow stiff wings, and dark slender bill. Emphasise: a slender bill with a slightly down-bent tip.

marsan.name: Marsh Sandpiper
marsan.id: Elegant pale slender wader with very long greenish legs, a fine straight needle-thin black bill, grey-brown streaked upperparts, white face and underparts, and a white rump and back wedge in flight.

martea1.name: Marbled Duck
martea1.id: Pale sandy-grey duck with dense whitish-buff spotting all over, a dark smudge through the eye, a shaggy nape, dark grey bill, and a slight crest; plain wings lack a bright speculum.

martit2.name: Marsh Tit
