martit2.id: Small plain brownish tit with a glossy black cap and small neat black bib, dull buff-white cheeks, warm brown-grey upperparts, pale buffy underparts, a short dark bill, and dark legs.

marwar1.name: Marmora's Warbler
marwar1.id: Small slim uniformly slate-grey warbler, slightly paler below, with a red orbital eye-ring, dark legs, and a long graduated dark tail often cocked; reddish iris and fine dark bill.

marwar3.name: Marsh Warbler
marwar3.id: Plain unstreaked warbler with warm olive-brown upperparts, pale buff-tinged whitish underparts, a faint pale supercilium, rounded head, pinkish legs, and a fine pointed bill; very similar to Reed Warbler.

masshr1.name: Masked Shrike
masshr1.id: Slim long-tailed shrike with black crown, back and face mask, white forehead and large white supercilium, white throat and belly, rich orange flanks, white wing and tail patches, and a slender black bill.

meapip1.name: Meadow Pipit
meapip1.id: Small streaky brown pipit, olive-brown above with heavy dark streaking, whitish underparts boldly streaked on breast and flanks, a thin pale eye-ring, pink legs with a very long hind claw, and fine bill.

medgul1.name: Mediterranean Gull
medgul1.id: Pale gull with an all-white wingtips, pale grey back, jet-black hood with broken white eye-crescents, bright blood-red drooping bill, and red legs; clean white underparts. Emphasise: bold white eye-crescents.

medshe1.name: Yelkouan Shearwater
medshe1.id: Medium shearwater, brownish-black above and dull whitish below with dusky smudging on flanks and undertail; less clean than Manx, with a dark cap and slim dark bill, stiff narrow wings. Emphasise: the correct slender bill shape.

melwar1.name: Melodious Warbler
melwar1.id: Plain greenish-grey warbler, olive-toned above and pale lemon-yellow below, with a yellowish face and faint supercilium, short rounded wings lacking a pale panel, pinkish-brown legs, and a broad pale-based bill.

merlin.name: Merlin
merlin.id: Small compact falcon; male slate-blue above with a rusty-streaked buff breast, faint dark moustache, and a broad black subterminal tail band; short pointed wings, yellow legs, dark-tipped yellow-based bill. Emphasise: less contrasting cheek markings.

mewgul.name: Common Gull
mewgul.id: Medium gull with a gentle rounded head, medium-grey back, white head and underparts, black wingtips with large white spots ('mirrors'), a plain greenish-yellow bill, dark eye, and yellow-green legs.

misthr1.name: Mistle Thrush
misthr1.id: Large pale grey-brown thrush with whitish underparts heavily marked with bold round black spots, greyish upperparts, white wing-bar edges, white-cornered tail, an upright stance, and pale belly; dark bill, pinkish legs. Emphasise: a shorter neck.

miswoo1.name: Middle Spotted Woodpecker
miswoo1.id: Pied woodpecker with a full bright-red crown (no black border), black-and-white barred back with white shoulder patches, white face, pinkish-flushed lower belly, faint flank streaking, and a pale dark-tipped bill. Emphasise: bold dark streaks on the flanks and belly.

monhar1.name: Montagu's Harrier
monhar1.id: Slender pale-grey harrier with long narrow wings, black wingtips and a single black bar across the upperwing, pale grey underparts with rusty streaks on belly and underwing; yellow eyes and legs.

monpar1.name: Monk Parakeet
monpar1.id: Bright green parakeet with a pale grey forehead, cheeks and scaly-grey breast, green crown and back, blue-tinged flight feathers, a long green tail, a pinkish-horn hooked bill, and grey legs.

mouchi2.name: Mountain Chiffchaff
mouchi2.id: Drab grey-brown leaf warbler with greyish upperparts, whitish underparts, a long whitish supercilium, dark eye-stripe, fine dark bill and blackish legs; lacks green and yellow tones, very plain.

moured1.name: Moussier's Redstart
moured1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
moured1.id: Striking small chat; male slaty-black above with a bold white supercilium curving onto the nape, a large white wing patch, and bright rufous-orange underparts and rump; black tail, dark legs and bill.

mouwar1.name: Moustached Warbler
mouwar1.id: Small rich warbler with rufous-brown upperparts, a bold white supercilium contrasting with a blackish crown and eye-stripe, white throat, warm buff flanks, rufous rump, and a fine dark bill; often cocks its tail.

mouwhe2.name: Mourning Wheatear
mouwhe2.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
mouwhe2.id: Pied wheatear; black face, throat, wings and back contrasting sharply with white crown, nape and underparts, buff-tinged vent, and a white rump with black inverted-T tail pattern; black bill and legs.

mstlar1.name: Mediterranean Short-toed Lark
mstlar1.id: Small pale sandy short-toed lark, greyish-buff above with fine streaking, whitish below with light breast streaking, a pale supercilium, stubby pale finch-like bill, and pale pinkish legs; plain face.

musduc.name: Muscovy Duck
musduc.id: Large heavy blackish duck with glossy greenish-black plumage, bold white wing patches, and extensive red warty bare skin (caruncles) around the face and bill base; dark legs, broad body, short legs.

mutswa.name: Mute Swan
mutswa.id: Very large all-white swan with a long gracefully S-curved neck, an orange bill with a prominent black basal knob, black facial skin and lores, and black legs; wings often arched over the back.

namdov1.name: Namaqua Dove
namdov1.id: Tiny long-tailed dove; male pale grey-brown with a black face, throat and breast, white belly, chestnut wing patches in flight, a very long pointed tail, and a red-and-yellow bill.

nohowl.name: Northern Hawk Owl
nohowl.id: Medium hawk-like owl with a long tail, brown-and-white finely barred underparts, white-spotted brown upperparts, a pale facial disc bordered by bold black sideburns, yellow eyes, and a yellowish bill. Emphasise: eyes with softer, less heavy dark framing.

norful.name: Northern Fulmar
norful.id: Stocky grey-and-white gull-like tubenose with a pale grey back and wings, white head and underparts, a thick neck, dark eye-smudge, and a short stout yellowish bill with prominent tube-nostrils. Emphasise: a thick bill with prominent tubular nostrils on top.

norgan.name: Northern Gannet
norgan.id: Large white seabird with long narrow black-tipped wings, a buff-yellow wash on the head and nape, a long pointed pale-grey dagger bill, pale grey legs, and a slender pointed tail; cigar-shaped body.

norgos1.name: Eurasian Goshawk
norgos1.id: Large powerful hawk; slate-grey above, finely grey-barred white below, with a dark crown and broad white supercilium over a fierce orange-red eye, broad rounded wings, a long barred tail, and yellow legs.

norhar1.name: Hen Harrier
norhar1.id: Slim grey-and-white harrier; male pale ash-grey above with black wingtips, white underparts and rump, long wings and tail; rounded head, yellow eyes and legs, low-set wings held in a V. Emphasise: a small bill and a gentle, owl-like face, not falcon-like.

norlap.name: Northern Lapwing
norlap.id: Black-and-white plover with iridescent green-glossed black upperparts, a long wispy black crest, black breast-band, white face and belly, orange-buff undertail, broad rounded wings, and dark reddish legs. Emphasise: the correct face pattern with a long wispy crest.

norpin.name: Northern Pintail
norpin.id: Elegant slender duck; drake has a chocolate-brown head, white breast extending as a stripe up the neck, grey body, black-and-cream rear, and very long pointed central tail feathers; blue-grey bill.

norsho.name: Northern Shoveler
norsho.id: Drake has a huge spatulate black bill, glossy green head, white breast, chestnut flanks and belly, black-and-white back, and a pale-blue forewing patch; orange legs; front-heavy low-floating profile.

norshr1.name: Great Gray Shrike
norshr1.id: Large pale grey shrike, soft grey above and white below, with a bold black face mask, black wings showing a white patch, a long black white-edged tail, and a hooked black bill.

norwhe.name: Northern Wheatear
norwhe.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
norwhe.id: Slim chat; male blue-grey above, buff-white below, with a bold black face mask, white supercilium, black wings, and a white rump with a black inverted-T tail pattern; black bill and legs.

oltwar1.name: Olive-tree Warbler
oltwar1.id: Large pale grey warbler, greyish above and whitish below, with a long heavy spike-like pinkish bill, a pale wing panel, a faint pale eye-ring, upright stance, and bluish-grey legs; warbler with a shrike-like bill.

ortbun1.name: Ortolan Bunting
ortbun1.id: Bunting with an olive-grey head and breast, a pale yellow throat and eye-ring (spectacle), rusty-buff belly, streaked brown back, a pinkish bill, and pinkish legs; subtle but distinctive head pattern.

ortdov.name: Oriental Turtle-Dove
ortdov.id: Large turtle-dove with a heavily black-and-rufous scaled back and wings, a pinkish-grey breast, black-and-blue-grey barred neck patch, a grey rump, dark tail with grey tip, and pinkish-red legs.

osprey.name: Osprey
osprey.id: Large fish-eagle; dark brown above and white below, with a white head crossed by a broad dark eye-stripe through the eye, a dark wrist patch on long crooked wings, yellow eyes, and grey feet.

padwar1.name: Paddyfield Warbler
padwar1.id: Small warm-brown reed warbler with rusty-tinged upperparts and rump, a prominent whitish supercilium bordered above by a dark line, pale buff underparts, a short fine bill, and a rounded often-cocked tail. Emphasise: soft, low-contrast feathering in warm tan tones.

palhar1.name: Pallid Harrier
palhar1.id: Slim pale harrier; male very pale silvery-grey above and white below with a small black wedge at the wingtip, very long narrow wings, a slender body, white rump, and yellow eyes and legs.

palroc1.name: Pale Rockfinch
palroc1.id: Plain pale sandy-grey finch with unstreaked greyish-brown upperparts, pale whitish underparts, a stout conical pale bill, faint pale wing edgings, large dark eye, and pinkish legs; very nondescript.

palsun2.name: Palestine Sunbird
palsun2.id: Tiny sunbird; male glossy metallic blue-green over head, throat and back, with a blackish belly and a small reddish-orange breast band, a long thin decurved black bill, and dark legs.

palswi3.name: Pallid Swift
palswi3.id: Slim brown swift, paler sandy-brown overall than Common Swift, with a larger pale throat patch, a darker eye-mask, paler underparts, a broad blunt head, scythe-shaped wings, and a forked tail.

palwar5.name: Pallas's Leaf Warbler
palwar5.id: Tiny bright leaf warbler, green above with a bold lemon-yellow rump band, two strong yellow wing-bars, a broad yellow central crown-stripe and supercilium, dark eye-stripe, and a fine dark bill.

parcro2.name: Parrot Crossbill
parcro2.id: Bulky crossbill with a very large deep parrot-like crossed bill; male brick-red overall with browner wings, paler belly and rump, a thick neck and large head, and dark legs.

parjae.name: Parasitic Jaeger
parjae.id: Slim dark-and-pale seabird with pointed central tail feathers projecting; pale-morph adult has a dark cap, yellowish neck, white underparts with a faint breast-band, dark upperparts, white wing flashes, and a small bill.

pecsan.name: Pectoral Sandpiper
pecsan.id: Medium sandpiper with brown scaly upperparts and a sharply demarcated, densely streaked buff breast ending in a clean line against white belly. Faint pale supercilium, slightly drooping dark bill with paler base, and dull yellow-green legs.

perfal.name: Peregrine Falcon
perfal.id: Powerful falcon with slate blue-grey back and wings, pale whitish underparts finely barred grey-black, and a distinctive dark hooded head with broad black moustachial sausage on white cheeks. Yellow cere and eye-ring, yellow feet, dark hooked bill, pointed wings.

pieavo1.name: Pied Avocet
pieavo1.id: Elegant white wader boldly patterned with black cap, nape and wing bars on the white body. Long slender upturned black bill, long bluish-grey legs, and a graceful slim-necked shape.

piekin1.name: Pied Kingfisher
piekin1.id: Crested black-and-white kingfisher speckled and barred all over; white underparts with one or two black breast bands, black mask and crest streaked white. Long straight black dagger bill, blackish legs, large head.

pifgoo.name: Pink-footed Goose
pifgoo.id: Compact grey-brown goose with a darker chocolate-brown head and neck, pale-fringed back giving a barred look, and pale grey forewing. Short dark bill with a pink central band, and bright pink legs and feet.

pingro.name: Pine Grosbeak
pingro.id: Plump large finch with a stubby curved black bill; male rich rosy-red on head, breast and rump with grey flanks and belly, blackish wings showing two white wing bars. Dark eye, dark legs, long notched tail.

pitsan1.name: Pin-tailed Sandgrouse
pitsan1.id: Sandgrouse with a white belly, chestnut-bordered creamy breast band, finely vermiculated greenish-buff upperparts, and very long needle-like central tail feathers. Small pigeon-like head, short grey bill, feathered legs.

pomjae.name: Pomarine Jaeger
pomjae.id: Bulky dark skua, pale morph with blackish cap, white underparts, dark brown back and broad breast band, white wing flash. Diagnostic long blunt central tail feathers twisted into a spoon, heavy bill, dark legs.

purher1.name: Purple Heron
purher1.id: Slender dark heron with a long sinuous neck; slate-grey back, rich rufous-chestnut neck striped with black lines, and dark purplish-maroon underparts. Long dagger-like yellowish bill, snaky head, very long yellowish legs.

pursan.name: Purple Sandpiper
pursan.id: Dark stocky sandpiper, slate-grey upperparts with purplish gloss and pale feather fringes, grey-streaked breast fading to white belly. Slightly drooping dark bill with orange-yellow base, and orange-yellow legs.

purswa.name: Western Swamphen
purswa.id: Large bulky rail in deep purple-blue plumage with turquoise sheen on throat and breast. Massive triangular red bill and frontal shield, red eye, long thick red legs and huge red feet, white undertail flashed in tail.

pygcor2.name: Pygmy Cormorant
pygcor2.id: Small slim cormorant, dark brown-black plumage with a small rounded head and a notably long stiff tail. Short stubby yellowish bill, dark legs; overall daintier and longer-tailed than larger cormorants.

radacc2.name: Radde's Accentor
radacc2.id: Small grey-brown accentor with plain warm-brown back, buff underparts, and a striking pale buff-white supercilium contrasting with a dark eyestripe and greyish crown. Thin dark sparrow-like bill, pinkish legs.

razorb.name: Razorbill
razorb.id: Black-and-white auk with a glossy black head and upperparts, pure white underparts, and a thin white line running from eye to the bill base. Deep flat-sided black bill crossed by a vertical white line, black legs.

rebcho1.name: Red-billed Chough
rebcho1.id: All-black crow with a glossy purplish sheen, broad rounded wings with splayed fingered primaries, and a square tail. Long curved bright red bill and bright red legs are the key marks.

rebfly.name: Red-breasted Flycatcher
rebfly.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
rebfly.id: Tiny flycatcher with plain grey-brown upperparts, whitish underparts, and a peachy-orange throat patch bordered greyish. Bold white patches at the base of the blackish tail, white eye-ring, thin dark bill, dark legs.

rebgoo1.name: Red-breasted Goose
rebgoo1.id: Small strikingly patterned goose, mostly black with bold white-bordered chestnut-red cheeks, throat and breast. White flank stripe and undertail, short stubby dark bill, black legs; compact rounded body.

rebmer.name: Red-breasted Merganser
rebmer.id: Slim diving duck; male has a dark glossy-green spiky-crested head, white neck collar, rusty-streaked breast band, grey flanks and black-and-white back. Thin serrated red bill, red eye, reddish legs.

rebshr1.name: Red-backed Shrike
rebshr1.id: Compact shrike; male has a blue-grey crown and nape, broad black mask through the eye, rich chestnut back and wings, and pinkish-white underparts. Black tail edged white, hooked black bill, dark legs.

recpoc.name: Red-crested Pochard
recpoc.id: Large diving duck; male has a rounded rusty-orange head, black breast and stern, white flanks, and pale brown back. Bright coral-red bill, red eye, pinkish-red legs.

redava.name: Red Avadavat
redava.id: Tiny finch; breeding male deep crimson-red overall, browner on wings and belly, spangled with many small white spots on flanks and wings. Stubby bright red bill, dark tail, pinkish legs.

redcro.name: Red Crossbill
redcro.id: Chunky finch with a unique crossed-tipped bill; male brick-red to orange-red overall, brightest on rump, with darker brown wings and tail. Female olive-grey-green. Dark legs, large head, short forked tail.

redkit1.name: Red Kite
redkit1.id: Large graceful raptor with rich rufous-chestnut body and underwings, a pale grey streaked head, and a long deeply forked rusty tail. Wings show bold white patches under the black-tipped primaries; yellow legs, yellow-based hooked bill.

redkno.name: Red Knot
redkno.id: Stocky medium wader; breeding adult has brick-red face, neck and underparts, with grey, black and chestnut scaled upperparts. Straight medium black bill, short greenish-grey legs, dumpy rounded shape.

redpha1.name: Red Phalarope
redpha1.id: Plump phalarope; breeding female brick-red below with a black crown, white face patch and dark grey-streaked back. Short stout yellow bill tipped black, lobed dark legs.

redpol1.name: Redpoll
redpol1.id: Tiny streaky brown finch with a crimson-red forehead patch, small black chin bib, and a pinkish wash on the breast of males. Buff-and-brown streaked back, two pale wing bars, tiny yellowish bill, dark legs.

redwin.name: Redwing
redwin.id: Small dark thrush with olive-brown upperparts, whitish underparts boldly streaked dark on breast and flanks. Striking creamy supercilium and rusty-red flanks and underwing, yellowish-based dark bill, pale legs.

reebun.name: Reed Bunting
reebun.id: Sparrow-like bunting; breeding male has a black head and throat, a broad white moustache and collar, streaky brown back and whitish underparts. Conical dark bill, pinkish-brown legs, white outer tail feathers.

refblu1.name: Red-flanked Bluetail
refblu1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
refblu1.id: Small chat-like bird; male slate-blue above on head, back and tail, with bright orange-red flanks, white throat and belly. Thin dark bill, dark legs; the blue tail and orange flanks are diagnostic.

reffal1.name: Red-footed Falcon
reffal1.id: Small slim falcon; male overall dark slate-grey with rusty-red thighs and undertail coverts, and silvery-grey flight feathers. Bright orange-red cere, eye-ring and legs, dark hooked bill.

rekcoo1.name: Red-knobbed Coot
rekcoo1.id: Slaty-black waterbird like a coot, with a white bill and frontal shield topped by two distinctive dark red knobs above the shield. Red eye, greenish lobed legs, rounded sooty body.

relpar1.name: Red-legged Partridge
relpar1.id: Plump round partridge with brown back, blue-grey breast, and bold black-streaked chestnut-and-white barred flanks. White throat bordered by a black necklace breaking into streaks, red bill, red legs, red eye-ring.

rengre.name: Red-necked Grebe
rengre.id: Stocky grebe; breeding adult has a chestnut-red neck, pale grey cheeks bordered by a black cap, and dark grey-brown back. Stout black bill with yellow base, dark legs set far back, dark eye.

rennig1.name: Red-necked Nightjar
rennig1.id: Large pale nightjar with cryptic grey-brown vermiculated plumage; warm rufous collar across the nape, buff-spotted wings, and small white throat patches. Tiny dark bill, very large dark eyes, short legs.

renpha.name: Red-necked Phalarope
renpha.id: Dainty phalarope; breeding female has a dark grey head and back, white throat, a bright rufous-orange neck patch, and buff stripes on the back. Very thin needle-like black bill, dark lobed legs.

retloo.name: Red-throated Loon
retloo.id: Slender diver; breeding adult has a soft grey head and neck with a brick-red throat patch and fine black-and-white striping down the hindneck. Plain grey-brown back, thin uptilted dark bill, dark legs.

retpip.name: Red-throated Pipit
retpip.id: Streaky pipit with heavily dark-streaked olive-brown upperparts and whitish underparts streaked on breast and flanks. Diagnostic brick-red wash on the face, throat and supercilium. Thin pinkish bill, pale pinkish legs.

ricpip1.name: Richard's Pipit
ricpip1.id: Large long-legged pipit; warm buff-brown above with bold dark streaking, pale buff breast with fine dark streaks, whitish belly. Long pale supercilium, stout pale-based bill, very long pinkish legs and long hind claw.

rinduc.name: Ring-necked Duck
rinduc.id: Diving duck; male glossy black head with a faint purple sheen, black breast and back, pale grey flanks with a white spur near the breast. Grey bill with a white ring near the black tip, peaked crown, yellow eye.

rinouz1.name: Ring Ouzel
rinouz1.id: Thrush-like blackbird; male sooty-black with a bold white crescent breast band and pale-scaled belly. Wings show frosty pale feather edges, yellowish dark-tipped bill, dark legs.

rinphe1.name: Ring-necked Pheasant
rinphe1.id: Large long-tailed gamebird; male has a glossy bottle-green head, red facial wattles, often a white neck ring, and coppery-gold body mottled black. Very long pointed barred tail, pale bill, greyish legs.

rintea1.name: Ringed Teal
rintea1.id: Small ornate duck; pinkish-buff body with bold black-spotted breast and flanks, a chestnut back, blackish crown-stripe down a pale face and neck. Grey-blue bill, pink legs, green-and-white speculum.

rocbun1.name: Rock Bunting
rocbun1.id: Bunting with a pale blue-grey head marked by black eyestripe and black lateral crown stripes, plain grey throat and breast, and warm rufous-chestnut belly and back streaked black. Conical dark bill, pinkish legs.

rocnut1.name: Western Rock Nuthatch
rocnut1.id: Stocky nuthatch; plain blue-grey above, whitish to buff below, with a bold black eyestripe running from bill through the eye onto the neck. Long pointed grey bill, short tail, large head, grey legs.

rocpet1.name: Rock Sparrow
rocpet1.id: Stocky pale sparrow with streaky grey-brown upperparts, a boldly striped head with broad pale crown stripe and supercilium, and a small yellow throat spot. White tail-tip spots, stout pale horn bill, pinkish legs.

rocpig.name: Rock Pigeon
rocpig.id: Medium pigeon; blue-grey overall with a darker head, glossy green-purple neck sheen, two bold black wing bars, and a white rump. Pale grey back, black-tipped tail, dark bill with white cere, pinkish-red legs.

rocpip1.name: Rock Pipit
rocpip1.id: Robust dark pipit with grey-olive heavily streaked upperparts and dingy grey-buff underparts streaked dark. Faint pale eye-ring, indistinct supercilium, dark bill, and dark greyish legs (not pink). Emphasise: a slightly adjusted, rounded head shape.

rocpta1.name: Rock Ptarmigan
rocpta1.id: Plump grouse; breeding adult mottled grey-brown above with white belly and white wings. Male shows a black line from bill through the eye and a small red comb above the eye; feathered white legs, small dark bill. Patterning irregular and broken for camouflage, not regular or uniform. Emphasise: irregular, mottled cryptic camouflage rather than a regular pattern.

rolhaw.name: Rough-legged Hawk
rolhaw.id: Large pale buteo with whitish underparts, a dark belly patch, and a dark carpal patch on the underwing. White tail with a broad black subterminal band, streaked head, small yellow-based bill, feathered legs to the toes.

rook1.name: Rook
rook1.id: Large all-black crow with glossy purplish sheen; diagnostic bare greyish-white skin at base of long, pointed grey bill. Shaggy 'baggy-trousered' thigh feathers, peaked crown, blackish legs. Slimmer-headed than Carrion Crow. Emphasise: bare greyish-white skin on the face around the base of the bill.

rorpar.name: Rose-ringed Parakeet
rorpar.id: Slim long-tailed bright grass-green parakeet with very long pointed tail; large red hooked bill. Male shows narrow black-and-rose neck collar; pale blue wash on nape. Grey-green legs.

rosgoo.name: Ross's Goose
rosgoo.id: Small stocky white goose with black wingtips; short stubby pink-based bill with bluish 'grin patch' at base. Rounded head, pink legs and feet. Like a miniature Snow Goose. Emphasise: a small stubby bill, pink with a bluish base.

rosgul.name: Ross's Gull
rosgul.id: Small delicate gull, dove-like, pale grey above with white wedge-shaped tail; pinkish flush on white underparts. Breeding adult has thin black neck ring; small black bill, red legs, dark eye. Emphasise: a stronger rosy-pink flush on the underparts.

rossta2.name: Rosy Starling
rossta2.id: Pink-and-black starling: glossy black head, neck, wings and tail with shaggy crest; bright rosy-pink back and breast. Pinkish-yellow bill, pink legs. Starling shape and size.

rtrthr1.name: Rufous-tailed Rock-Thrush
rtrthr1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
rtrthr1.id: Robin-sized thrush; male has blue-grey head and back, white patch on lower back, and bright orange-rufous breast, belly and tail. Dark wings, thin dark bill, brownish legs. Emphasise: no dark neck-ring or collar.

rudduc.name: Ruddy Duck
rudduc.id: Small dumpy diving duck with large head and stiff cocked tail; chestnut body, black cap, gleaming white cheeks. Bright sky-blue bill (breeding male), dark legs.

rudshe.name: Ruddy Shelduck
rudshe.id: Large orange-chestnut shelduck with paler buff-orange head; black bill and legs. In flight shows bold white wing coverts and green speculum. Slim black neck collar in breeding male.

rudtur.name: Ruddy Turnstone
rudtur.id: Stocky short-legged wader with harlequin pattern: rich chestnut-and-black back, black-and-white head and breast, white belly. Short slightly upturned black bill, bright orange legs. Emphasise: bold, correctly placed harlequin black-and-white facial markings.

ruewar1.name: Rüppell's Warbler
ruewar1.id: Slim grey Sylvia-type warbler; male has black hood and throat bordered by bold white moustachial stripe. Grey upperparts, whitish underparts, red eye-ring, reddish eye, blackish legs.

ruff.name: Ruff
ruff.id: Medium wader with small head, longish neck and slightly drooped bill; scaly buff-and-brown upperparts. Breeding male has huge ruff and head tufts (variable colour). Orange to greenish legs. Emphasise: breeding males extremely variable, with ornate ruffs in many colours.

rusbun.name: Rustic Bunting
rusbun.id: Bunting with rufous-chestnut breast band, flanks streaking and nape; black-and-white head with white supercilium and small crest. Whitish underparts, streaked brown back, pinkish bill, pale legs.

rutscr1.name: Rufous-tailed Scrub-Robin
rutscr1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
rutscr1.id: Slim warm rufous-brown chat with long, often-cocked rufous tail tipped black and white. Pale supercilium, dark eyestripe, whitish underparts. Long pale legs, fine dark bill.

sabgul.name: Sabine's Gull
sabgul.id: Small graceful gull with striking tricoloured upperwing: grey, black and white triangles. Breeding adult has dark slate-grey hood edged black, forked white tail, yellow-tipped black bill.

sacibi2.name: African Sacred Ibis
sacibi2.id: Large white ibis with bare black head and neck and long down-curved black bill; black plumes (drooping tertials) over rear. Black legs, black wingtips visible in flight.

sander.name: Sanderling
sander.id: Small pale plump sandpiper; very pale grey above and clean white below with black shoulder mark. Short straight black bill, black legs (no hind toe). Palest of the small sandpipers.

santer1.name: Sandwich Tern
santer1.id: Slim pale tern with shaggy black crest; pale grey above, white below. Long slender black bill with distinctive yellow tip; short black legs, slightly forked white tail.

sarwar1.name: Sardinian Warbler
sarwar1.id: Compact Sylvia warbler; male has glossy black cap reaching below eye, grey back, white throat, greyish underparts. Bold red eye-ring and red eye, blackish bill, pale legs.

savwar1.name: Savi's Warbler
savwar1.id: Plain warm unstreaked reddish-brown warbler with rounded, broad fan-shaped tail; faint buff supercilium, whitish throat, buffy underparts. Slim pointed bill, pinkish legs.

scoshe1.name: Scopoli's Shearwater
scoshe1.id: Large brown-grey shearwater, brown above and white below; pale grey-brown head merging into white throat. Yellowish bill with dark tip; pinkish legs. Long broad wings.

sedwar1.name: Sedge Warbler
sedwar1.id: Streaky brown warbler with bold creamy-white supercilium and darker crown; warm rufous unstreaked rump, streaked back, plain buff underparts. Pointed dark bill, pinkish legs.

semfly1.name: Semicollared Flycatcher
semfly1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
semfly1.id: Small black-and-white flycatcher; male has black upperparts, white underparts, large white wing patch, white forehead spots and a narrow half white neck collar. Black bill and legs.

sheowl.name: Short-eared Owl
sheowl.id: Medium pale buff-brown owl boldly streaked dark; rounded facial disc with piercing yellow eyes ringed black, short ear tufts. Long wings showing dark wrist patches. Feathered legs.

shteag1.name: Short-toed Snake-Eagle
shteag1.id: Large pale eagle, greyish-brown above, white below; broad dark brown head and upper breast. Striking bright yellow eyes, big rounded head, owl-like face. Long broad wings, pale bluish bill.

shttre1.name: Short-toed Treecreeper
shttre1.id: Small streaky brown bird with curved fine bill and stiff pointed tail; brown white-spotted upperparts, dingy buff-white underparts. Short blurry supercilium, brownish flanks, pale legs.

sibjay1.name: Siberian Jay
sibjay1.id: Soft grey-brown jay; greyish head and back, rusty-orange patches on wings, rump and outer tail. Dusky crown, short dark bill, dark legs. Fluffy rounded shape, medium tail.

skylar.name: Eurasian Skylark
skylar.id: Streaky brown lark with short erectile crest; pale buff underparts streaked on breast, whitish belly. White trailing edge to wing and white outer tail feathers. Stout pinkish bill, pale legs.

slbgul1.name: Slender-billed Gull
slbgul1.id: Pale elegant gull with long sloping forehead and long slender unicolor dark-red bill; pale grey back, white head, white underparts often pink-flushed. Pale eye, orange-red legs.

smew.name: Smew
smew.id: Small white sawbill duck; drake mostly white with fine black markings: black eye-patch, black nape stripe and breast lines. Short grey bill, grey flanks, blue-grey legs. Crested white head.

snobun.name: Snow Bunting
snobun.id: Small bunting; breeding male white-headed and white-bodied with black back, black wingtips and large white wing patches. Black-and-white tail, short black bill, black legs.

snogoo.name: Snow Goose
snogoo.id: Medium white goose with black wingtips; stout pink bill with black 'grin patch', pink legs. (Dark 'blue' morph has white head and dark grey body.) Rounded head, white tail.

snoowl1.name: Snowy Owl
snoowl1.id: Large white owl with rounded head and no ear tufts; bright yellow eyes. Female and immature variably barred dark grey-brown; male nearly pure white. Heavily feathered feet, small black bill.

soclap1.name: Sociable Lapwing
soclap1.id: Slim long-legged plover; grey-brown upperparts, buff breast, white belly. Bold black cap with broad white supercilia meeting on nape, dark eyestripe. Black bill, dark legs, black belly patch in breeding.

somtit3.name: Sombre Tit
somtit3.id: Stout dull tit; dusky brown-black cap and large black bib, pale buff-grey cheeks, brown-grey back, buffy-white underparts. Short stubby dark bill, dark legs. Larger-billed than Marsh Tit.

sonthr1.name: Song Thrush
sonthr1.id: Warm brown thrush, plain above; creamy-buff underparts boldly marked with neat dark arrowhead spots. Plain buffish face, dark eye, yellowish lower bill, pinkish legs. Slim and upright.

sooshe.name: Sooty Shearwater
sooshe.id: Large all-dark sooty-brown shearwater; long narrow swept-back wings showing silvery-white flash on underwing coverts. Slender dark bill, dark legs. Cigar-shaped body.

spaeag1.name: Spanish Eagle
spaeag1.id: Large dark brown eagle; adult shows distinctive white leading edge to wing (shoulder) and pale golden nape. Broad wings, smallish head, yellow cere and feet, dark hooked bill, feathered legs.

spaspa1.name: Spanish Sparrow
spaspa1.id: Sparrow; male has chestnut crown, white cheeks, and heavy black streaking on white flanks and back; large black bib spreading onto breast. Stout grey-black bill, brown back, pinkish legs.

spewar2.name: Spectacled Warbler
spewar2.id: Small Sylvia warbler; male has grey-brown head, rufous-edged wings, white throat, pinkish-buff breast. Bold red-orange eye-ring, dark lores, reddish eye, yellowish legs, fine dark bill.

spocra1.name: Spotted Crake
spocra1.id: Small secretive rail; olive-brown above heavily spotted white, grey-brown breast finely speckled white, buff undertail. Short yellow bill with red base, greenish legs, brown crown.

spofly1.name: Spotted Flycatcher
spofly1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
spofly1.id: Slim grey-brown flycatcher; pale greyish-white underparts with diffuse dark streaks on crown and breast. Plain face, large dark eye, thin pointed black bill, dark legs. Upright posture.

spored.name: Spotted Redshank
spored.id: Elegant slim wader with very long fine drooped black-and-red bill; breeding adult sooty-black with white spotting on upperparts. Long dark-red legs, white wedge up back in flight.

sposta1.name: Spotless Starling
sposta1.id: All-black starling with subtle oily green-purple gloss; lacks pale spotting. Long pointed yellow bill, reddish-pink legs. Shaggy throat feathers; like an unspotted Common Starling.

spwlap1.name: Spur-winged Lapwing
spwlap1.id: Bold pied lapwing; black crown, throat and breast, white cheeks and neck-sides, sandy-brown back, white belly. Long black legs, black bill, sharp carpal wing spurs. White wing band.

squher1.name: Squacco Heron
squher1.id: Small stocky buff heron; pale sandy-buff body and neck, white wings and rump (showing white in flight). Long buff crown plumes, yellowish bill with dark tip, greenish legs.

steeag1.name: Steppe Eagle
steeag1.id: Large dark brown eagle with broad wings; uniform earth-brown plumage, paler nape patch, gape line extending back to below eye. Yellow cere and feet, feathered legs, dark hooked bill.

steeid.name: Steller's Eider
steeid.id: Small eider; drake has white head with greenish nape tinge, black eye-patch and chin, white neck and back, rich orange-buff underparts with black spot on side. Blue-grey bill, grey legs.

stodov1.name: Stock Dove
stodov1.id: Compact blue-grey pigeon; soft grey body, pinkish breast, iridescent green neck patch, two short black wing bars. Dark eye, dark-tipped pale bill, pinkish-red legs. No white on neck or rump.

stonec4.name: European Stonechat
stonec4.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
stonec4.id: Small upright chat; male has black head, orange-red breast, white half-collar and white wing and rump patches. Dark brown streaked back, whitish belly, fine dark bill, black legs.

subwar6.name: Western Subalpine Warbler
subwar6.id: Small Sylvia warbler; male has blue-grey head and upperparts, brick-orange throat and breast, and bold white moustachial stripe. White belly, red eye-ring, pale orange legs, fine dark bill.

subwar8.name: Moltoni's Warbler
subwar8.id: Small slim warbler; male has slate-grey head and upperparts, brick-orange throat and breast fading to whitish belly, narrow white submoustachial stripe, red eye-ring, and pinkish legs.

sursco.name: Surf Scoter
sursco.id: Bulky black sea-duck; drake all-black with bold white patches on forehead and nape, and a swollen multicoloured orange, white and black bill with round black spot near base; staring white eye.

swagoo1.name: Swan Goose
swagoo1.id: Large long-necked goose; pale buff underparts, brown-and-buff barred upperparts, dark chocolate stripe down the back of the long neck, large black bill (often with white base ring), and orange legs.

syrwoo1.name: Syrian Woodpecker
syrwoo1.id: Pied woodpecker; black-and-white back with large white shoulder patches, white underparts with pinkish vent, plain white cheek lacking full black collar; male shows red nape patch. Greyish bill, grey legs.

taibeg1.name: Taiga Bean-Goose
taibeg1.id: Large brown goose; dark brown head and neck, paler brown body, long slim black bill with broad orange band, and bright orange legs. Slender-necked and long-billed.

tawowl1.name: Tawny Owl
tawowl1.id: Stocky round-headed owl with big black eyes; rich rufous-brown plumage streaked and mottled darker, pale facial disc, whitish eyebrows and shoulder spots. Hooked yellowish bill, feathered legs.

tawpip1.name: Tawny Pipit
tawpip1.id: Slim pale sandy-buff pipit with nearly unstreaked breast, dark eyestripe and pale supercilium, dark median-covert wing bar, and long pale legs; wagtail-like long-tailed shape. Pinkish bill.

temsti.name: Temminck's Stint
temsti.id: Tiny short-legged sandpiper; uniform grey-brown breast and upperparts, white belly, faint scaly back pattern, white outer tail feathers, and short straight dark bill. Dull yellowish-green legs.

tersan.name: Terek Sandpiper
tersan.id: Small pale-grey sandpiper with a long upturned dark bill (orange at base) and short bright orange-yellow legs; grey upperparts, white underparts, faint dark shoulder lines.

thbmur.name: Thick-billed Murre
thbmur.id: Heavy black-and-white auk; blackish head, throat and upperparts, clean white underparts, with a thick pointed black bill bearing a thin white line along the gape. Stocky upright build.

thelar1.name: Thekla's Lark
thelar1.id: Crested lark with a short steep pointed crest; grey-brown upperparts boldly streaked, plain greyish underparts with crisp dark breast streaks, short stubby bill, and grey rump. Pale eye-ring.

thrnig1.name: Thrush Nightingale
thrnig1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
thrnig1.id: Plain brown chat; warm dark olive-brown upperparts, rufous-tinged tail, and mottled greyish breast with diffuse darker scaling on whitish underparts. Slender pinkish legs, dark bill.

trepip.name: Tree Pipit
trepip.id: Streaky olive-buff pipit; brown-streaked back, buff breast with bold black streaks thinning on flanks, pale supercilium, and pinkish legs with a short hind claw. Fine dark bill.

tstlar1.name: Turkestan Short-toed Lark
tstlar1.id: Small pale sandy lark; plain greyish-buff upperparts with fine streaking, whitish underparts with a faint dark patch on the breast-side, pale supercilium, and a short stubby pale bill. Pinkish legs.

tufduc.name: Tufted Duck
tufduc.id: Compact black-and-white diving duck; drake glossy black with bright white flanks, a drooping tufted crest off the nape, golden-yellow eye, and a blue-grey bill with black tip.

tunbeg1.name: Tundra Bean-Goose
tunbeg1.id: Large brown goose; very dark brown head and neck, paler brown body, short deep-based black bill with narrow orange band, and orange legs. Stockier and shorter-billed than Taiga Bean-Goose.

tunswa.name: Tundra Swan
tunswa.id: Compact white swan with a rounded head; black bill with a small rounded yellow patch limited to the base (not reaching the nostril), and black legs. Shorter-necked than Whooper Swan.

twite1.name: Twite
twite1.id: Small streaky finch; warm buff-brown plumage streaked dark, plain buffy unstreaked throat, pinkish rump, and a short yellow bill (greyer in summer). White edges to wing and tail feathers.

upcwar1.name: Upcher's Warbler
upcwar1.id: Plain greyish warbler with a long broad blackish tail edged paler, grey-brown upperparts, whitish underparts, pale lores giving a plain face, and a long stout pinkish-based bill.

uraowl1.name: Ural Owl
uraowl1.id: Large pale long-tailed owl; greyish-buff plumage boldly streaked dark on whitish underparts, plain rounded pale facial disc with small dark eyes, and a yellow bill. Long barred tail.

wallcr1.name: Wallcreeper
wallcr1.id: Ash-grey songbird with a long thin decurved black bill; striking crimson wing panels and rounded black wings spotted white; blackish throat (breeding), grey body, and short blackish tail.

watpip1.name: Water Pipit
watpip1.id: Slim grey-brown pipit with streaked upperparts; breeding adult shows pinkish-buff unstreaked breast, grey head, white supercilium, white outer tail feathers, and dark legs. Fine dark bill.

watrai1.name: Water Rail
watrai1.id: Slim long-billed rail; olive-brown back streaked black, blue-grey face and breast, black-and-white barred flanks, buff undertail, and a long slightly downcurved red bill. Pinkish legs.

webwar1.name: Western Bonelli's Warbler
webwar1.id: Small pale leaf-warbler; greyish-green upperparts with a bright yellow-green panel on wings and rump, clean white underparts, plain whitish face with a pale eye-ring, and a yellowish lower bill.

wemhar1.name: Western Marsh Harrier
wemhar1.id: Large slim harrier; male has brown body with pale streaked head, grey wings and tail, and black wingtips; long wings held in shallow V. Yellow eye and legs, dark bill.

weowar1.name: Western Olivaceous Warbler
weowar1.id: Plain pale warbler; uniform grey-brown upperparts, dull whitish underparts, plain face with faint pale supercilium, and a long straight broad-based pinkish bill. Long squarish dark tail, greyish legs.

weowar2.name: Western Orphean Warbler
weowar2.id: Large grey warbler; blackish-grey crown and cheeks contrasting with greyish back, whitish throat with peachy-buff flanks, and a pale lemon-yellow staring eye. Stout dark bill, grey legs.

wescap1.name: Western Capercaillie
wescap1.id: Huge dark grouse; male has blackish-grey body, glossy dark-green breast, brown wings, fan-shaped black tail spotted white, shaggy beard, red wattle over eye, and a stout ivory bill.

wfspet.name: White-faced Storm-Petrel
wfspet.id: Small grey-and-white storm-petrel; grey-brown upperparts with pale wing panel and grey rump, white underparts and face with a dark eye-stripe and dark crown, white face, and long yellow legs with black feet.

whbwoo1.name: White-backed Woodpecker
whbwoo1.id: Large pied woodpecker; black upperparts with a white lower back, white-barred wings, white underparts streaked dark on flanks, pinkish-red vent; male has a full red crown. Long grey bill.

whhduc1.name: White-headed Duck
whhduc1.id: Stiff-tailed duck; male has a mostly white head with small black cap, rusty-brown body, dark neck collar, and a swollen sky-blue bill. Often holds spiky tail cocked upward.

whimbr5.name: Eurasian Whimbrel
whimbr5.id: Large brown curlew with a long downcurved bill; brown-streaked plumage, a strongly striped crown showing a dark lateral stripe and pale central stripe, pale supercilium, and bluish-grey legs.

whinch1.name: Whinchat
whinch1.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
whinch1.id: Small perky chat; streaky brown upperparts, warm orange-buff breast, bold creamy supercilium over a dark cheek, and white wing patches; white tail-base patches. Fine dark bill, dark legs.

whisto1.name: White Stork
whisto1.id: Large white stork; pure white body with black flight feathers, long straight bright red bill, and long red legs. Bare red facial skin around the eye.

whiter2.name: Whiskered Tern
whiter2.id: Marsh tern; breeding adult has black cap, dark grey upperparts and uniform grey underparts contrasting with white cheeks, and a slightly forked grey tail. Deep dark-red bill and red legs.

whiwag.name: White Wagtail
whiwag.id: Slim black-white-grey wagtail; grey back, black crown and bib, white face, white underparts, and a long black tail edged white that it wags. Black bill and legs.

whoswa.name: Whooper Swan
whoswa.id: Large white swan with a long straight neck held erect; black bill with a large triangular yellow wedge extending forward past the nostril to a point, and black legs.

whrswi1.name: White-rumped Swift
whrswi1.id: Slim black swift with a square tail; sooty-black plumage with a narrow white throat patch and a clean white horseshoe-shaped band across the rump. Long scythe-shaped wings.

whsbul1.name: White-spectacled Bulbul
whsbul1.id: Slim dark bulbul; sooty grey-brown body, blackish hood, conspicuous bright white eye-ring (spectacle), and a contrasting bright yellow vent. Slender dark bill, dark legs.

whtdip1.name: White-throated Dipper
whtdip1.id: Plump dark dipper with a short cocked tail; rich chocolate-brown head and chestnut-tinged upperparts, dark grey body, and a bold white throat and breast bib. Short dark bill, dark legs.

whteag.name: White-tailed Eagle
whteag.id: Massive brown eagle with broad plank-like wings; pale sandy-brown body and head, dark wings, and a short wedge-shaped pure white tail. Large yellow hooked bill, yellow feet.

whtkin2.name: White-throated Kingfisher
whtkin2.id: Stocky kingfisher; chocolate-brown head, belly and flanks, brilliant turquoise-blue back, wings and tail, a large white throat and breast bib, and a heavy bright red bill. Red legs.

whtrob3.name: White-throated Robin
whtrob3.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
whtrob3.id: Slim chat; slate-grey upperparts, black face and breast-sides framing a white throat and supercilium, rich orange flanks and breast, and a black tail. Fine dark bill, blackish legs.

whwcro.name: White-winged Crossbill
whwcro.id: Stocky finch with crossed-tip bill; male rosy-pink overall with blackish wings showing two bold white wing bars and white tertial tips. Dark bill, dark legs.

whwsno1.name: White-winged Snowfinch
whwsno1.id: Stocky sparrow-like finch; pale grey head, brown back, white underparts, and bold black-and-white wings showing large white panels; black-tipped tail with white sides. Black bill (breeding), dark legs.

whwter.name: White-winged Tern
whwter.id: Small marsh tern; breeding adult strikingly black head, body and underwing coverts contrasting with pale grey-white upperwings and white tail and rump. Short dark-red bill, red legs.

wilpta2.name: Willow Ptarmigan
wilpta2.id: Plump grouse; breeding male has rich rusty-brown head, neck and breast, white wings and belly, red eye-comb, and a short black-and-white tail. Stubby black bill, feathered white legs.

wiltit1.name: Willow Tit
wiltit1.id: Small dumpy tit; large dull black cap reaching the nape, black bib, pale buffy-brown flanks, whitish cheeks, and brown-grey upperparts with a pale wing panel. Short dark bill.

winwre4.name: Eurasian Wren
winwre4.id: Tiny rotund brown bird with a short cocked tail; warm rufous-brown plumage finely barred darker on wings, flanks and tail, a pale supercilium, and a fine thin bill. Brownish legs.

wispet.name: Wilson's Storm-Petrel
wispet.id: Small sooty-black storm-petrel with a bold white U-shaped rump band wrapping onto the flanks, squared tail, and a pale diagonal bar across the upperwing. Black bill; long black legs whose yellow-webbed feet trail beyond the tail tip.

wlwwar.name: Willow Warbler
wlwwar.id: Slim olive-green warbler with pale yellowish underparts, a soft yellow supercilium over a dark eyeline, plain unmarked wings, and a fine thin bill. Pale orange-brown legs; clean, gentle-faced appearance.

wooduc.name: Wood Duck
wooduc.id: Ornate duck with a glossy iridescent green-and-purple crested head striped white, red eye, red-and-white bill, chestnut breast spotted white, buff flanks, and a black back. Bold white throat patch and finger-like white facial lines.

woolar1.name: Wood Lark
woolar1.id: Small streaky brown lark with a short tail, long buff-white supercilia meeting across the nape, a small crest, and dark crescent at the wing bend bordered black-and-white. Whitish underparts streaked dark on the breast; pinkish legs.

woosan.name: Wood Sandpiper
woosan.id: Slim, elegant wader with brown upperparts heavily spangled white, a long pale supercilium, streaked breast fading to white belly, and a barred white tail. Straight dark bill; long yellow-green legs.

wooshr1.name: Woodchat Shrike
wooshr1.id: Boldly patterned shrike with a rich chestnut crown and nape, black mask through the eye, black back and wings with a large white wing patch, and clean white underparts and rump. Stout hooked black bill.

woowar.name: Wood Warbler
woowar.id: Bright leaf-warbler with vivid yellow-green upperparts, a long lemon-yellow supercilium, yellow throat and breast contrasting sharply with a clean white belly, and long wings. Pale legs; slim fine bill.

y00427.name: Siberian Stonechat
y00427.family: Old World Flycatchers, Robins, and Chats
y00427.id: Compact chat with a black head and throat, white half-collar on the neck side, orange-rufous breast, and pale unstreaked rump. Dark brown back, blackish wings; black bill and legs; upright stance.

y00478.name: Iceland Gull
y00478.id: Pale 'white-winged' gull with frosty grey back and pure white wingtips lacking black, rounded head, and dark eye. Long wings extending well past the tail; yellow bill with red gonys spot; pink legs.

y00743.name: Carrion Crow
y00743.id: Wholly glossy black crow with a green-purple sheen, heavy black bill with feathered base, black legs, and a squarish tail. Robust, evenly proportioned; lacks any grey or pale areas.

yebcho1.name: Yellow-billed Chough
yebcho1.id: Glossy black crow-relative with a short slender bright-yellow bill, deep red legs and feet, and broad rounded wings. Wholly black plumage; compact, pigeon-headed look with a longish tail.

yebloo.name: Yellow-billed Loon
yebloo.id: Large loon with a steeply angled, upturned ivory-yellow bill held slightly raised, blackish head, white-checkered black back, and white underparts. Bold black-and-white neck collar; thick neck.

yebwar3.name: Yellow-browed Warbler
yebwar3.id: Tiny bright leaf-warbler, greenish above with two bold yellowish-white wingbars, a long creamy supercilium, dark eyestripe, and pale tertial edges. Whitish underparts; thin dark bill, pale legs; very small and active.

yecbis.name: Yellow-crowned Bishop
yecbis.id: Tiny weaver with a brilliant golden-yellow crown, nape, lower back and underparts contrasting with a black face, throat, breast band and belly. Brownish streaked wings; short conical bill; round-bodied.

yelgul1.name: Yellow-legged Gull
yelgul1.id: Large gull with a clean white head, dark slate-grey back and wings, black wingtips with small white spots, and yellow legs. Stout yellow bill with a strong red gonys spot; red orbital ring around a pale eye.

yellow2.name: Yellowhammer
yellow2.id: Bunting with a bright lemon-yellow head and underparts marked with chestnut, a yellow-streaked breast band, warm chestnut-brown streaked back, and a rufous-chestnut rump. Greyish conical bill; pinkish legs.

zitcis1.name: Zitting Cisticola
zitcis1.id: Tiny warbler with a short rounded tail tipped white-and-black below, buff-brown crown and upperparts boldly streaked black, and plain pale buff underparts. Pale eyebrow; fine pointed bill; pinkish legs.
